                                    <span class="badge-spec @specClass" data-ar="@specLabelAr" data-en="@specLabelEn">
                                        <i class="fas @specIcon"></i> @specLabelAr
                                    </span>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <span class="badge-gender @(isMale ? "badge-male" : "badge-female")"
                                          data-ar="@(isMale ? "ذكر" : "أنثى")" data-en="@(isMale ? "Male" : "Female")">
                                        <i class="fas @(isMale ? "fa-mars" : "fa-venus")"></i> @(isMale ? "ذكر" : "أنثى")
                                    </span>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <span class="role-pill @(isPm ? "pm" : "")"
                                          data-ar="@roleLabelAr" data-en="@roleLabelEn">
                                        <i class="fas @(isPm ? "fa-user-tie" : "fa-hard-hat")"></i> @roleLabelAr
                                    </span>
                                </td>
                                <td>@emp.HireDate.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")</td>
                                <td>
                                    <span class="emp-salary">@emp.Salary.ToString("N0")</span>
                                    <span class="emp-salary-currency" data-lang="currency_egp">ج.م</span>
                                </td>

                                            </a>
                                        </div>
                                    </td>

                        }

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        (function () {
            var searchInput = document.getElementById('empSearchInput');
            var specFilter = document.getElementById('specFilter');
            var genderFilter = document.getElementById('genderFilter');
            var resetBtn = document.getElementById('resetFiltersBtn');
            var table = document.getElementById('empTable');
            var visibleCountEl = document.getElementById('visibleCount');
            var noResultsState = document.getElementById('noResultsState');

            if (!table) return;

            var rows = Array.prototype.slice.call(table.querySelectorAll('tbody tr'));

            function applyFilters() {
                var term = (searchInput.value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
                var spec = specFilter.value;
                var gender = genderFilter.value;
                var visible = 0;

                rows.forEach(function (row) {
                    var matchesTerm = !term ||
                        row.dataset.name.indexOf(term) !== -1 ||
                        (row.dataset.email || '').indexOf(term) !== -1 ||
                        (row.dataset.phone || '').indexOf(term) !== -1;

                    var matchesSpec = !spec || row.dataset.spec === spec;
                    var matchesGender = !gender || row.dataset.gender === gender;

                    var show = matchesTerm && matchesSpec && matchesGender;
                    row.style.display = show ? '' : 'none';
                    if (show) visible++;
                });

                visibleCountEl.textContent = visible;
                if (noResultsState) {
                    noResultsState.style.display = visible === 0 ? 'block' : 'none';
                }
            }

            searchInput.addEventListener('input', applyFilters);
            specFilter.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);
            genderFilter.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);
            resetBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
                searchInput.value = '';
                specFilter.value = '';
                genderFilter.value = '';
                applyFilters();
            });

            // Update tooltips on language change
            document.addEventListener('languageChanged', function (e) {
                var lang = e.detail.lang;
                document.querySelectorAll('[data-tip-ar]').forEach(function (el) {
                    el.setAttribute('data-tip', lang === 'ar' ? el.dataset.tipAr : el.dataset.tipEn);
                });
            });
        })();
    </script>
}

    <script>
        (function () {
            var darkBtn  = document.getElementById('darkModeBtn');
            var darkIcon = document.getElementById('darkModeIcon');

            function applyDarkMode(on) {
                document.body.classList.toggle('dark-mode', on);
                darkIcon.className = on ? 'fas fa-sun' : 'fas fa-moon';
                localStorage.setItem('bonyan-dark', on ? '1' : '0');
            }

            window.toggleDarkMode = function () {
                applyDarkMode(!document.body.classList.contains('dark-mode'));
            };

            darkIcon.className = document.body.classList.contains('dark-mode') ? 'fas fa-sun' : 'fas fa-moon';
        })();
    </script>

@section Scripts {
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js"></script>
    <script>
        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
            const isDarkMode = document.body.classList.contains('dark-mode');
            const textMutedColor = isDarkMode ? '#8899aa' : '#888888';
            const gridBorderColor = isDarkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.08)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)';

            // 1. Bar Chart
            const ctxBar = document.getElementById('projectsBarChart').getContext('2d');
            new Chart(ctxBar, {
                type: 'bar',
                data: {
                    labels: ['Planning', 'InProgress', 'OnHold', 'Completed', 'Cancelled'],
                    datasets: [{
                        label: 'Projects',
                        data: [@Model.ProjPlanning, @Model.ProjInProgress, @Model.ProjOnHold, @Model.ProjCompleted, @Model.ProjCancelled],
                        backgroundColor: ['#4bc0c0', '#2ecc71', '#f1c40f', '#e74c3c', '#9b59b6'],
                        borderRadius: 6,
                        barThickness: 25
                    }]
                },
                options: {
                    responsive: true,
                    maintainAspectRatio: false,
                    plugins: { legend: { display: false } },
                    scales: {
                        y: { grid: { color: gridBorderColor }, ticks: { color: textMutedColor, stepSize: 1 } },
                        x: { grid: { display: false }, ticks: { color: textMutedColor } }
                    }
                }
            });

            // 2. Doughnut Chart
            const ctxDoughnut = document.getElementById('tasksDoughnutChart').getContext('2d');
            new Chart(ctxDoughnut, {
                type: 'doughnut',
                data: {
                    labels: ['ToDo', 'InProgress', 'UnderReview', 'Completed', 'Cancelled'],
                    datasets: [{
                        data: [@Model.TaskPending, @Model.TaskInProgress, @Model.TaskUnderReview, @Model.TaskCompleted, @Model.TaskCancelled],
                        backgroundColor: ['#3498db', '#f39c12', '#9b59b6', '#2ecc71', '#e74c3c'],
                        borderWidth: isDarkMode ? 3 : 2,
                        borderColor: isDarkMode ? '#1a2535' : '#ffffff'
                    }]
                },
                options: {
                    responsive: true,
                    maintainAspectRatio: false,
                    plugins: {
                        legend: {
                            position: 'bottom',
                            labels: { color: textMutedColor, padding: 10, font: { size: 11, weight: '600' }, usePointStyle: true, pointStyle: 'rectRounded' }
                        }
                    },
                    cutout: '70%'
                }
            });
        });
    </script>
}=== File: ./BonyanForEngineeringConsultingFirms/Views/Home/Index.cshtml ===
﻿@using Bonyan.DAL.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "الرئيسية";
    var role = Context.Session.GetString("Role") ?? "";
    var fullName = Context.Session.GetString("FullName") ?? "المستخدم";
    var email = Context.Session.GetString("Email") ?? "";
    var isAdmin = role == "Admin";
    var isPM = role == "ProjectManager";
    var isEngineer = role == "Engineer";

    int projectCount = ViewBag.ProjectCount ?? 0;
    int taskCount = ViewBag.TaskCount ?? 0;
    int employeeCount = ViewBag.EmployeeCount ?? 0;
    int invoiceCount = ViewBag.InvoiceCount ?? 0;
    int inProgress = ViewBag.ProjectsInProgress ?? 0;
    int planning = ViewBag.ProjectsPlanning ?? 0;
    int completed = ViewBag.ProjectsCompleted ?? 0;
    int onHold = ViewBag.ProjectsOnHold ?? 0;

    string today = DateTime.Now.ToString("dddd، d MMMM yyyy",
                     new System.Globalization.CultureInfo("ar-SA"));
    string todayEn = DateTime.Now.ToString("dddd, MMMM d, yyyy",
                     System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);

    // ── Role display info ─────────────────────────────────────
    string roleIconClass = isAdmin ? "fas fa-shield-alt"
                         : isPM ? "fas fa-project-diagram"
                         : "fas fa-hard-hat";
    string roleColorClass = isAdmin ? "role-badge-admin"
                          : isPM ? "role-badge-pm"
                          : "role-badge-engineer";
    string roleArLabel = isAdmin ? "مدير النظام"
                       : isPM ? "مدير المشروع"
                       : "مهندس";
    string roleEnLabel = isAdmin ? "Admin"
                       : isPM ? "Project Manager"
                       : "Engineer";
}

<div class="home-two-col">

    <!-- Left: Recent Projects -->
    <div class="home-panel">
        <div class="home-panel-header">
            <h3 class="home-section-title">
                <i class="fas fa-folder-open"></i>
                <span data-lang="recent_projects">أحدث المشاريع</span>
            </h3>
            <a asp-controller="Project" asp-action="Index"
               class="home-view-all" data-lang="view_all">عرض الكل</a>
        </div>

        <div class="recent-projects-grid">
            @if (ViewBag.RecentProjects != null && ((IEnumerable<dynamic>)ViewBag.RecentProjects).Any())
            {
                foreach (var p in ViewBag.RecentProjects)
                {
                    string topClass = p.Status switch
                    {
                        ProjectStatus.InProgress => "inprogress",
                        ProjectStatus.Planning => "planning",
                        ProjectStatus.Completed => "completed",
                        ProjectStatus.OnHold => "onhold",
                        ProjectStatus.Cancelled => "cancelled",
                        _ => "planning"
                    };
                    string statusAr = p.Status switch
                    {
                        ProjectStatus.Planning => "تخطيط",
                        ProjectStatus.InProgress => "جاري التنفيذ",
                        ProjectStatus.Completed => "مكتمل",
                        ProjectStatus.OnHold => "موقوف",
                        ProjectStatus.Cancelled => "ملغي",
                        _ => p.Status.ToString()
                    };
                    string statusEn = p.Status.ToString();

                    int daysLeft = 0;
                    if (p.EndDate != null)
                        daysLeft = Math.Max(0, (int)((DateTime)p.EndDate - DateTime.Now).TotalDays);

                    int taskCnt = p.Tasks?.Count ?? 0;
                    int docCnt = p.Documents?.Count ?? 0;

                    <a class="rp-card" asp-controller="Project" asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@p.ProjectId">
                        <div class="rp-card-top @topClass"></div>
                        <div class="rp-card-body">
                            <div class="rp-card-name" title="@p.ProjectName">@p.ProjectName</div>
                            <div class="rp-card-client">
                                <i class="fas fa-user-tie" style="font-size:0.68rem;margin-left:3px;"></i>
                                @(p.Client_Name ?? "—")
                            </div>

                            <span class="rp-status-badge @topClass"
                                  data-en="@statusEn" data-ar="@statusAr">
                                @statusAr
                            </span>

                            <div class="rp-card-meta">
                                @if (taskCnt > 0)
                                {
                                    <span>
                                        <i class="fas fa-tasks"></i>
                                        @taskCnt <span data-lang="meta_tasks">مهمة</span>
                                    </span>
                                }
                                @if (docCnt > 0)
                                {
                                    <span>
                                        <i class="fas fa-file-alt"></i>
                                        @docCnt <span data-lang="meta_docs">مستند</span>
                                    </span>
                                }
                                @if (p.EndDate != null && p.Status != ProjectStatus.Completed && p.Status != ProjectStatus.Cancelled)
                                {
                                    <span class="rp-days-left">
                                        @daysLeft <span data-lang="meta_days">يوم متبقٍّ</span>
                                    </span>
                                }
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </a>
                }
            }
            else
            {
                <div style="grid-column:1/-1;text-align:center;padding:40px;color:var(--muted);">
                    <i class="fas fa-folder-open" style="font-size:2.5rem;opacity:0.3;display:block;margin-bottom:12px;"></i>
                    <span data-lang="no_projects">لا توجد مشاريع حتى الآن</span>
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Right: Recent Tasks -->
    <div class="home-panel">
        <div class="home-panel-header">
            <h3 class="home-section-title">
                <i class="fas fa-clock"></i>
                <span data-lang="recent_tasks">آخر المهام</span>
            </h3>
            <a asp-controller="Task" asp-action="Index"
               class="home-view-all" data-lang="view_all">عرض الكل</a>
        </div>

        <div class="activity-feed">
            @if (ViewBag.RecentTasks != null)
            {
                foreach (var t in ViewBag.RecentTasks)
                {

                    {
                        TasksStatus.Pending => "gold",
                        TasksStatus.InProgress => "blue",
                        TasksStatus.Completed => "green",
                        TasksStatus.Cancelled => "red",
                        TasksStatus.UnderReview => "purple",
                        _ => "blue"
                    };
                    string statusAr = t.Status switch
                    {
                        TasksStatus.Pending => "معلق",
                        TasksStatus.InProgress => "جاري",
                        TasksStatus.UnderReview => "قيد المراجعة",
                        TasksStatus.Completed => "مكتمل",
                        TasksStatus.Cancelled => "ملغي",
                        _ => t.Status.ToString()
                    };
                    <div class="af-item">
                        <div class="af-dot @dotColor">
                            <i class="fas fa-tasks"></i>
                        </div>
                        <div class="af-text">
                            <p>@t.Task_Name</p>
                            <span data-en="@t.Status.ToString()" data-ar="@statusAr">@statusAr</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                }
            }
            else
            {
                <div style="text-align:center;padding:30px;color:var(--muted);font-size:0.85rem;">
                    <span data-lang="no_data">لا توجد بيانات</span>
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    </div>

</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        // ── Date pill + role badge: switch AR/EN on lang toggle ─────────
        document.addEventListener('languageChanged', function (e) {
            const lang = e.detail.lang;

            // Date pill
            document.querySelectorAll('[data-lang-text]').forEach(el => {
                el.style.display = (el.getAttribute('data-lang-text') === lang) ? '' : 'none';
            });

            // Role badge text
            document.querySelectorAll('.role-ar').forEach(el => {
                el.style.display = lang === 'ar' ? '' : 'none';
            });
            document.querySelectorAll('.role-en').forEach(el => {
                el.style.display = lang === 'en' ? '' : 'none';
            });
        });
    </script>
}

    double progPct = Model?.InProgressPercent ?? 55;
    double compPct = Model?.CompletedPercent ?? 80;
    double holdPct = Model?.OnHoldPercent ?? 15;

        // "bonyan-dark" key as the rest of the app, so the theme picked here
        // stays consistent after logging in).
        (function () {
            const saved = localStorage.getItem('bonyan-dark');
            const prefersDark = window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches;
            if (saved === '1' || (saved === null && prefersDark)) document.body.classList.add('dark-mode');
        })();

    <script>
        function toggleTheme() {
            const body = document.body;
            const icon = document.getElementById('themeIcon');
            const isDark = body.classList.toggle('dark-mode');
            icon.className = isDark ? 'fas fa-sun' : 'fas fa-moon';
            localStorage.setItem('bonyan-dark', isDark ? '1' : '0');
        }

        (function () {
            const icon = document.getElementById('themeIcon');
            if (icon && document.body.classList.contains('dark-mode')) {
                icon.className = 'fas fa-sun';
            }
        })();
    </script>
</body>

﻿@* Views/Inventory/Details.cshtml *@
@model Bonyan.DAL.Models.Inventory
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "تفاصيل المخزن";
    var role = Context.Session.GetString("Role");
    var availableMaterials = ViewBag.AvailableMaterials as List<Bonyan.DAL.Models.Material> ?? new();
    var otherInventories = ViewBag.OtherInventories as List<Bonyan.DAL.Models.Inventory> ?? new();
    decimal usedVol = ViewBag.UsedVolumeM3 != null ? (decimal)ViewBag.UsedVolumeM3 : 0;
    decimal remCap = ViewBag.RemainingCapacityM3 != null ? (decimal)ViewBag.RemainingCapacityM3 : 0;
    decimal fillRate = ViewBag.FillRatePercent != null ? (decimal)ViewBag.FillRatePercent : 0;
    bool showWarning = ViewBag.ShowWarning != null && (bool)ViewBag.ShowWarning;
    bool isFull = ViewBag.IsFull != null && (bool)ViewBag.IsFull;
    bool hasCapacity = Model.Capacity.HasValue && Model.Capacity > 0;
    string barColor = fillRate >= 100 ? "#e53935" : fillRate >= 85 ? "#f57c00" : "#4caf50";
}

<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/employee.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/employee-dark.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/material.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/inventory.css" />

<div class="page-header">
    <div class="page-header-left">
        <h2>
            <i class="fas fa-warehouse"></i>
            @Model.InventoryName
        </h2>
        <p>
            @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Model.Location))
            {
                <i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt" style="color:var(--secondary)"></i>
                <span>@Model.Location</span>
            }
            else
            {
                <span data-lang="warehouse_details">تفاصيل المخزن</span>
            }
        </p>
    </div>
    <div class="page-header-actions">
        <a asp-action="Index" class="btn-bonyan-primary">
            <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i> <span data-lang="back_to_warehouses">رجوع للمخازن</span>
        </a>
        @if (role == "Admin")
        {
            <a asp-action="Edit" asp-route-id="@Model.InventoryID" class="btn-bonyan-secondary">
                <i class="fas fa-edit"></i> <span data-lang="edit">تعديل</span>
            </a>
        }
    </div>
</div>

@await Html.PartialAsync("_AlertMessages")

<!-- ══ FULL CAPACITY ALERT ════════════════════════════ -->
@if (isFull && hasCapacity)
{
    <div class="inv-alert inv-alert-full">
        <i class="fas fa-ban inv-alert-icon"></i>
        <div>
            <div class="inv-alert-title"><span data-lang="warehouse_full_title">المخزن وصل إلى طاقته الاستيعابية الكاملة!</span></div>
            <div class="inv-alert-body" data-lang="warehouse_full_desc">لا توجد مساحة متاحة في هذا المخزن. لا يمكن إضافة أي مواد جديدة. يرجى اختيار مخزن آخر لديه سعة كافية.</div>
            @if (otherInventories.Any())
            {
                <div class="inv-other-warehouses-label">
                    <i class="fas fa-warehouse" style="color:#388e3c"></i> <span data-lang="available_warehouses">المخازن المتاحة:</span>
                </div>
                <div class="inv-other-warehouses-grid">
                    @foreach (var oi in otherInventories)
                    {
                        decimal oiUsed = oi.MaterialInventories
                        .Sum(mi => mi.QuantityAvailable * (mi.Material?.VolumeFactorM3 ?? 1.0m));
                        decimal oiRemaining = oi.Capacity.HasValue ? oi.Capacity.Value - oiUsed : -1;
                        bool oiFull = oi.Capacity.HasValue && oiRemaining <= 0;

                        if (!oiFull)
                        {
                            <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@oi.InventoryID" class="inv-other-link">
                                <i class="fas fa-warehouse"></i>
                                @oi.InventoryName
                                @if (oi.Capacity.HasValue)
                                {
                                    <span class="sub">@oiRemaining.ToString("N1") م³ متبقية</span>
                                }
                            </a>
                        }
                    }
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    </div>
}

<!-- ══ 85% WARNING ALERT ══════════════════════════════ -->
@if (showWarning && !isFull)
{
    <div class="inv-alert inv-alert-warning">
        <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle inv-alert-icon"></i>
        <div>
            <div class="inv-alert-title"><span data-lang="warehouse_near_full">تحذير: المخزن على وشك الامتلاء!</span></div>
            <div class="inv-alert-body">
                نسبة الاستخدام وصلت إلى <strong>@fillRate%</strong>.
                يُنصح بالنظر في توفير مخزن إضافي أو تأجيل الشحنات الواردة.
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
}

<!-- ══ KPI SUMMARY GRID ═══════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="inv-kpi-grid">
    <div class="inv-kpi-card">
        <div class="kpi-label" data-lang="material_count">عدد المواد</div>
        <div class="kpi-value">@Model.MaterialInventories.Count</div>
    </div>
    <div class="inv-kpi-card">
        <div class="kpi-label" data-lang="total_capacity_m3">السعة الكلية (م³)</div>
        <div class="kpi-value gold">@(hasCapacity ? Model.Capacity!.Value.ToString("N0") : "—")</div>
    </div>
    @if (hasCapacity)
    {
        <div class="inv-kpi-card">
            <div class="kpi-label" data-lang="used_volume_m3">الحجم المستخدم (م³)</div>
            <div class="kpi-value warning">@usedVol.ToString("N2")</div>
        </div>
        <div class="inv-kpi-card @(isFull ? "bordered-danger" : "bordered-success")">
            <div class="kpi-label" data-lang="remaining_capacity_m3">السعة المتبقية (م³)</div>
            <div class="kpi-value @(isFull ? "danger" : "success")">
                @(isFull ? "0.00" : remCap.ToString("N2"))
                @if (isFull)
                {
                    <div class="kpi-sub" data-lang="completely_full">ممتلئ بالكامل!</div>
                }
            </div>
        </div>
    }
    <div class="inv-kpi-card">
        <div class="kpi-label" data-lang="last_updated">آخر تحديث</div>
        <div class="kpi-value small">@Model.LastUpdatedDate.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")</div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ CAPACITY BAR ══════════════════════════════════ -->
@if (hasCapacity)
{
    <div class="inv-capacity-card">
        <div class="inv-capacity-header">
            <div class="inv-capacity-title">
                <i class="fas fa-tachometer-alt"></i> <span data-lang="usage_rate">نسبة استخدام المخزن</span>
            </div>
            <div class="inv-capacity-pct" style="color:@barColor">@(Math.Min(fillRate, 100))%</div>
        </div>
        <div class="inv-capacity-bar-track">
            <div class="inv-capacity-bar-fill" style="width:@(Math.Min(fillRate, 100))%;background:@barColor"></div>
            <div class="inv-capacity-bar-label">
                @usedVol.ToString("N1") م³ / @Model.Capacity!.Value.ToString("N0") م³
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="inv-capacity-markers">
            <span>0%</span><span>25%</span><span>50%</span>
            <span class="marker-warn">85%⚠</span>
            <span class="marker-danger">100%⛔</span>
        </div>
        <div class="inv-capacity-legend">
            @foreach (var mi in Model.MaterialInventories)
            {
                if (mi.Material == null) continue;
                decimal vol = Math.Round(mi.QuantityAvailable * mi.Material.VolumeFactorM3, 2);
                <span class="inv-legend-item">
                    <span class="dot" style="background:var(--primary)"></span>
                    @mi.Material.MaterialName:
                    <strong>@vol م³</strong>
                    <span class="muted">(@mi.QuantityAvailable.ToString("N2") @(mi.Material.Unit ?? "") × @mi.Material.VolumeFactorM3 م³/وحدة)</span>
                </span>
            }
        </div>
    </div>
}

<!-- ══ MATERIALS SECTION ═════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="details-card inv-materials-card" style="margin-top:20px">
    <div class="details-header" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1e3a5f,#2a5298)">
        <div class="details-avatar" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);color:#fff">
            <i class="fas fa-boxes"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="details-header-info">
            <h3><span data-lang="materials_in_warehouse">المواد في المخزن</span> <span class="badge-count">@Model.MaterialInventories.Count</span></h3>
            <span data-lang="warehouse_subtitle">المواد المخزّنة في هذا المخزن</span>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="details-body">
        @if (Model.MaterialInventories != null && Model.MaterialInventories.Any())
        {
            <div class="inv-table-wrap">
            <table class="mat-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th data-lang="material">المادة</th>
                        <th data-lang="quantity">الكمية</th>
                        <th data-lang="volume_m3">الحجم (م³)</th>
                        <th data-lang="storage_location">مكان التخزين</th>
                        <th data-lang="entry_date">تاريخ الإدخال</th>
                        <th data-lang="notes">ملاحظات</th>
                        @if (role == "Admin")
                        {
                            <th data-lang="actions">إجراءات</th>
                        }
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var mi in Model.MaterialInventories)
                    {
                        if (mi.Material == null) continue;
                        decimal rowVol = Math.Round(mi.QuantityAvailable * mi.Material.VolumeFactorM3, 2);
                        <tr>
                            <td><span class="inv-link">@mi.Material.MaterialName</span></td>
                            <td>@mi.QuantityAvailable.ToString("N3") @(mi.Material.Unit ?? "")</td>
                            <td class="inv-vol">@rowVol م³</td>
                            <td>@(mi.StorageLocation ?? "—")</td>
                            <td class="inv-date">@mi.TransactionDate.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")</td>
                            <td class="inv-notes">@(mi.Notes ?? "—")</td>
                            @if (role == "Admin")
                            {
                                <td>
                                    <div class="inv-action-group">
                                        <button type="button" class="mat-action-btn edit"
                                                onclick="openUpdateForm(@mi.InventoryID, @mi.MaterialID, '@mi.QuantityAvailable.ToString("F3", System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)', @mi.Material.VolumeFactorM3.ToString("F4", System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture))"
                                                title="تحديث الكمية">
                                            <i class="fas fa-sync-alt"></i>
                                        </button>
                                        <a asp-action="RemoveMaterial"
                                           asp-route-inventoryId="@Model.InventoryID"
                                           asp-route-materialId="@mi.MaterialID"
                                           class="mat-action-btn danger" title="إزالة">
                                            <i class="fas fa-minus-circle"></i>
                                        </a>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                            }
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
            </div>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="inv-empty" data-lang="no_materials_in_warehouse">لا توجد مواد في هذا المخزن بعد</div>
        }

        <!-- Add Material Form (Admin only — hidden when inventory is full) -->
        @if (role == "Admin")
        {
            @if (isFull)
            {
                <!-- FULL: show locked state instead of the form -->
                <div class="inv-locked">
                    <i class="fas fa-lock inv-locked-icon"></i>
                    <div class="inv-locked-title" data-lang="warehouse_full_no_add">المخزن ممتلئ — لا يمكن إضافة مواد جديدة</div>
                    <div class="inv-locked-desc">
                        لقد استُنفدت الطاقة الاستيعابية الكاملة للمخزن (@Model.Capacity!.Value.ToString("N0") م³).
                        يرجى الانتقال إلى مخزن آخر لديه مساحة كافية.
                    </div>
                    @if (otherInventories.Any(oi =>
                    {
                        decimal u = oi.MaterialInventories.Sum(mi => mi.QuantityAvailable * (mi.Material?.VolumeFactorM3 ?? 1.0m));
                        return !oi.Capacity.HasValue || (oi.Capacity.Value - u) > 0;
                    }))
                    {
                        <div class="inv-locked-others">
                            @foreach (var oi in otherInventories)
                            {
                                decimal oiUsed2 = oi.MaterialInventories.Sum(mi => mi.QuantityAvailable * (mi.Material?.VolumeFactorM3 ?? 1.0m));
                                decimal oiRem2 = oi.Capacity.HasValue ? oi.Capacity.Value - oiUsed2 : 999999;
                                if (oiRem2 > 0)
                                {
                                    <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@oi.InventoryID" class="inv-other-link">
                                        <i class="fas fa-warehouse"></i> @oi.InventoryName
                                        @if (oi.Capacity.HasValue)
                                        {
                                            <span class="sub">@oiRem2.ToString("N1") م³</span>
                                        }
                                    </a>
                                }
                            }
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            }
            else if (availableMaterials.Any())
            {
                <div class="inv-add-form">
                    <div class="mat-add-title"><i class="fas fa-plus-circle"></i> <span data-lang="add_material_to_warehouse">إضافة مادة للمخزن</span></div>
                    <form asp-action="AddMaterial" method="post">
                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                        <input type="hidden" name="inventoryId" value="@Model.InventoryID" />
                        <div class="form-grid-3">
                            <div class="form-group">
                                <label data-lang="material">المادة</label> <span style="color:red">*</span>
                                <select name="materialId" class="form-control" required
                                        onchange="showVolPreview(this)">
                                    <option value="" data-lang="choose_material_option">-- اختر مادة --</option>
                                    @foreach (var mat in availableMaterials)
                                    {
                                        <option value="@mat.MaterialID"
                                                data-factor="@mat.VolumeFactorM3.ToString("F4", System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)"
                                                data-unit="@(mat.Unit ?? "")">
                                            @mat.MaterialName (@(mat.Unit ?? "—")) — معامل الحجم: @mat.VolumeFactorM3
                                        </option>
                                    }
                                </select>
                            </div>
                            <div class="form-group">
                                <label data-lang="quantity">الكمية</label> <span style="color:red">*</span>
                                <input type="number" name="quantityAvailable" step="0.001" min="0"
                                       class="form-control" placeholder="0.000" required id="addQty"
                                       oninput="showVolPreview(null)" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="form-group">
                                <label data-lang="storage_location">مكان التخزين</label>
                                <input type="text" name="storageLocation" class="form-control" data-lang-placeholder="shelf_placeholder" placeholder="مثال: رف A-3" />
                            </div>
                            <div class="form-group" style="grid-column:1 / -1">
                                <label data-lang="notes">ملاحظات</label>
                                <input type="text" name="notes" class="form-control" data-lang-placeholder="notes_placeholder2" placeholder="أي ملاحظات..." />
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Volume preview + live capacity warning -->
                        <div id="volPreview" class="inv-vol-preview">
                            <i class="fas fa-cube"></i>
                            الحجم الذي ستشغله هذه الكمية:
                            <strong id="volPreviewVal">0 م³</strong>
                            @if (hasCapacity)
                            {
                                <span>
                                    — السعة المتبقية حالياً:
                                    <strong id="remCapDisplay"
                                            style="color:@(remCap > 0 ? "#388e3c" : "#e53935")">
                                        @remCap.ToString("N2") م³
                                    </strong>
                                </span>
                            }
                        </div>

                        <!-- Inline warning when entered volume exceeds remaining capacity -->
                        <div id="capacityWarnBox" class="inv-warn-box">
                            <i class="fas fa-ban"></i>
                            <span id="capacityWarnText"></span>
                        </div>

                        <button type="submit" id="addMaterialBtn" class="btn-bonyan-secondary">
                            <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> <span data-lang="add_to_warehouse">إضافة للمخزن</span>
                        </button>
                    </form>
                </div>
            }
        }
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Update Stock Modal -->
@if (role == "Admin")
{
    <div id="updateStockOverlay" class="inv-modal-overlay" style="display:none">
        <div class="inv-modal-box">
            <h4 class="inv-modal-title">
                <i class="fas fa-sync-alt"></i> <span data-lang="update_quantity">تحديث الكمية</span>
            </h4>
            <form asp-action="UpdateStock" method="post">
                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                <input type="hidden" name="inventoryId" value="@Model.InventoryID" />
                <input type="hidden" name="materialId" id="updateMatId" />
                <input type="hidden" id="updateMatFactor" value="0" />
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="new_quantity">الكمية الجديدة</label> <span style="color:red">*</span>
                    <input type="number" name="newQuantity" id="updateNewQty"
                           step="0.001" min="0" class="form-control" required
                           oninput="checkUpdateCapacity()" />
                </div>
                <!-- Update capacity preview -->
                @if (hasCapacity)
                {
                    <div id="updateVolPreview" class="inv-vol-preview">
                        <i class="fas fa-cube"></i>
                        الحجم الجديد: <strong id="updateVolVal"></strong>
                    </div>
                    <div id="updateWarnBox" class="inv-warn-box">
                        <i class="fas fa-ban"></i> <span id="updateWarnText"></span>
                    </div>
                }
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="notes">ملاحظات</label>
                    <input type="text" name="notes" class="form-control" data-lang-placeholder="edit_reason_placeholder" placeholder="سبب التعديل..." />
                </div>
                <div class="inv-modal-actions">
                    <button type="button" onclick="closeUpdateForm()" class="btn-bonyan-primary">
                        <i class="fas fa-times"></i> <span data-lang="cancel">إلغاء</span>
                    </button>
                    <button type="submit" id="updateSubmitBtn" class="btn-bonyan-secondary">
                        <i class="fas fa-save"></i> <span data-lang="save">حفظ</span>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>
}

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        // ── Constants passed from server ──────────────────────────
        var REMAINING_CAP = @(hasCapacity? remCap.ToString("F4", System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) : "-1");
        var TOTAL_CAP = @(hasCapacity? Model.Capacity!.Value.ToString("F4", System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) : "-1");
        var USED_VOL = @usedVol.ToString("F4", System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);

        // ── Update modal ──────────────────────────────────────────
        var updateMatOtherVolume = 0; // volume of ALL other materials (excluding current one being updated)

        function openUpdateForm(invId, matId, currentQty, matFactor) {
            document.getElementById('updateMatId').value = matId;
            document.getElementById('updateNewQty').value = currentQty;
            document.getElementById('updateMatFactor').value = matFactor;

            // other volume = total used minus current material's volume
            updateMatOtherVolume = USED_VOL - (parseFloat(currentQty) * parseFloat(matFactor));

            document.getElementById('updateStockOverlay').style.display = 'flex';
            checkUpdateCapacity();
        }

        function closeUpdateForm() {
            document.getElementById('updateStockOverlay').style.display = 'none';
        }

        function checkUpdateCapacity() {
            if (TOTAL_CAP < 0) return;
            var qty = parseFloat(document.getElementById('updateNewQty').value) || 0;
            var factor = parseFloat(document.getElementById('updateMatFactor').value) || 0;
            var newVol = qty * factor;
            var totalAfter = updateMatOtherVolume + newVol;

            var previewBox = document.getElementById('updateVolPreview');
            var warnBox = document.getElementById('updateWarnBox');
            var warnText = document.getElementById('updateWarnText');
            var submitBtn = document.getElementById('updateSubmitBtn');
            var volVal = document.getElementById('updateVolVal');

            if (qty > 0 && factor > 0) {
                previewBox.style.display = 'block';
                volVal.textContent = newVol.toFixed(2) + ' م³';
            } else {
                previewBox.style.display = 'none';
            }

            if (totalAfter > TOTAL_CAP && TOTAL_CAP > 0) {
                warnBox.style.display = 'block';
                warnText.textContent = 'الكمية المدخلة (' + newVol.toFixed(2) + ' م³) ستتجاوز سعة المخزن! الحد الأقصى المتاح: ' + (TOTAL_CAP - updateMatOtherVolume).toFixed(2) + ' م³';
                submitBtn.disabled = true;
                submitBtn.style.opacity = '0.5';
            } else {
                warnBox.style.display = 'none';
                submitBtn.disabled = false;
                submitBtn.style.opacity = '1';
            }
        }

        // ── Add Material form ─────────────────────────────────────
        function showVolPreview(matSel) {
            var sel = matSel || document.querySelector('select[name="materialId"]');
            var qty = parseFloat(document.getElementById('addQty')?.value) || 0;
            var opt = sel?.options[sel?.selectedIndex];
            var factor = parseFloat(opt?.dataset?.factor) || 0;
            var vol = qty * factor;

            var preview = document.getElementById('volPreview');
            var warnBox = document.getElementById('capacityWarnBox');
            var warnText = document.getElementById('capacityWarnText');
            var addBtn = document.getElementById('addMaterialBtn');

            if (qty > 0 && factor > 0) {
                preview.style.display = 'block';
                document.getElementById('volPreviewVal').textContent = vol.toFixed(2) + ' م³';
            } else {
                preview.style.display = 'none';
            }

            // Live capacity enforcement
            if (REMAINING_CAP >= 0 && qty > 0 && factor > 0) {
                if (vol > REMAINING_CAP) {
                    var maxQty = REMAINING_CAP / factor;
                    warnBox.style.display = 'block';
                    warnText.textContent =
                        'الحجم المطلوب (' + vol.toFixed(2) + ' م³) يتجاوز السعة المتبقية (' +
                        REMAINING_CAP.toFixed(2) + ' م³). الحد الأقصى الذي يمكن إضافته: ' +
                        maxQty.toFixed(3) + ' ' + (opt?.dataset?.unit || 'وحدة') + '.';
                    addBtn.disabled = true;
                    addBtn.style.opacity = '0.5';
                } else {
                    warnBox.style.display = 'none';
                    addBtn.disabled = false;
                    addBtn.style.opacity = '1';
                }
            } else {
                warnBox.style.display = 'none';
                if (addBtn) { addBtn.disabled = false; addBtn.style.opacity = '1'; }
            }
        }
    </script>
}

        <form asp-action="Edit" method="post">

=== File: ./BonyanForEngineeringConsultingFirms/Views/Inventory/Index.cshtml ===
﻿@model IEnumerable<Bonyan.DAL.Models.Inventory>
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "المخازن";
    var role = Context.Session.GetString("Role");

    var inventoriesList = Model?.ToList() ?? new List<Bonyan.DAL.Models.Inventory>();
    int totalCount = inventoriesList.Count;
    int withLocation = inventoriesList.Count(i => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(i.Location));
    decimal totalCapacity = inventoriesList.Sum(i => i.Capacity ?? 0);
    int totalMaterialItems = inventoriesList.Sum(i => i.MaterialInventories.Count);
}

<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/material.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/employee.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/employee-dark.css" />

<div class="emp-page">

        </div>

        {

                            <th><i class="fas fa-warehouse"></i> <span data-lang="warehouse_name_label">اسم المخزن</span></th>
                            <th><i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt"></i> <span data-lang="location">الموقع</span></th>
                            <th><i class="fas fa-weight-hanging"></i> <span data-lang="capacity">السعة</span></th>
                            <th><i class="fas fa-boxes"></i> <span data-lang="material_count">عدد المواد</span></th>

                            @if (role == "Admin")
                            {
                                <th><i class="fas fa-cog"></i> <span data-lang="actions">إجراءات</span></th>

                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        @foreach (var inv in inventoriesList)
                        {

                                        <i class="fas fa-boxes"></i> @inv.MaterialInventories.Count
                                    </span>
                                </td>

                                                <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                                            </a>
                                            <a asp-action="Edit" asp-route-id="@inv.InventoryID"

                                                <i class="fas fa-edit"></i>
                                            </a>
                                            <a asp-action="Delete" asp-route-id="@inv.InventoryID"

                                                <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                                            </a>
                                        </div>
                                    </td>
                                }
                            </tr>
                        }
                    </tbody>
                </table>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        function calcFinal() {
            var total    = parseFloat(document.getElementById('totalAmount')?.value)    || 0;
            var taxPct   = parseFloat(document.getElementById('taxPercent')?.value)     || 0;
            var discPct  = parseFloat(document.getElementById('discountPercent')?.value) || 0;

            var discAmt = total * discPct / 100;
            var afterDisc = total - discAmt;
            var taxAmt  = afterDisc * taxPct / 100;
            var final   = afterDisc + taxAmt;

            var setEl = function (id, val) {
                var el = document.getElementById(id);
                if (el) el.textContent = val.toFixed(2) + ' ج.م';
            };
            setEl('dispTotal', total);
            setEl('dispDisc',  discAmt);
            setEl('dispTax',   taxAmt);
            setEl('dispFinal', final);

            calcRemaining();
        }

        function onStatusChange() {
            var status = document.getElementById('statusSelect').value;
            var row    = document.getElementById('amountPaidRow');
            var rowR   = document.getElementById('rowRemaining');
            var rowP   = document.getElementById('rowPaid');

            if (status === '2') {
                row.style.display  = 'block';
                rowR.style.display = 'flex';
                rowP.style.display = 'flex';
            } else {
                row.style.display  = 'none';
                rowR.style.display = 'none';
                rowP.style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('amountPaidInput').value = '';
            }
            calcRemaining();
        }

        function calcRemaining() {
            var finalEl   = document.getElementById('dispFinal');
            var finalText = finalEl ? finalEl.textContent.replace(' ج.م', '').trim() : '0';
            var final     = parseFloat(finalText) || 0;
            var paid      = parseFloat(document.getElementById('amountPaidInput')?.value) || 0;

            if (paid > final) {
                paid = final;
                document.getElementById('amountPaidInput').value = final.toFixed(2);
            }

            var remaining = final - paid;
            var setEl = function(id, val) {
                var el = document.getElementById(id);
                if (el) el.textContent = val.toFixed(2) + ' ج.م';
            };
            setEl('dispPaid',      paid);
            setEl('dispRemaining', remaining);
        }

        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', calcFinal);
    </script>
}

﻿@model Bonyan.DAL.Models.Invoice
@using Bonyan.DAL.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "تفاصيل الفاتورة";
    var role = Context.Session.GetString("Role");

    string statusLabel = Model.Invoice_Status switch
    {
        InvoiceStatus.Paid          => "مدفوعة",
        InvoiceStatus.Unpaid        => "غير مدفوعة",
        InvoiceStatus.PartiallyPaid => "مدفوعة جزئياً",
        _ => Model.Invoice_Status.ToString()
    };
    string statusColor = Model.Invoice_Status switch
    {
        InvoiceStatus.Paid          => "#146c43",
        InvoiceStatus.Unpaid        => "#842029",
        InvoiceStatus.PartiallyPaid => "#7c4a00",
        _ => "#666"
    };
    string statusBg = Model.Invoice_Status switch
    {
        InvoiceStatus.Paid          => "#d1e7dd",
        InvoiceStatus.Unpaid        => "#f8d7da",
        InvoiceStatus.PartiallyPaid => "#fff3cd",
        _ => "#eee"
    };

    decimal net = (Model.Total_Amount ?? 0)
                  * (1 + (Model.Tax ?? 0) / 100)
                  * (1 - (Model.Discount ?? 0) / 100);

    string statusEn = Model.Invoice_Status.ToString();
}

<div class="page-header">
    <div class="page-header-left">
        <h2>
            <i class="fas fa-edit" style="color:var(--secondary)"></i>
            <span data-lang="edit_invoice_hash">تعديل فاتورة #</span>@Model.Invoice_ID
        </h2>
    </div>
    <a asp-controller="Project" asp-action="Details"
       asp-route-id="@Model.ProjectId" class="btn-bonyan-primary">
        <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i> <span data-lang="back_to_project">رجوع للمشروع</span>
    </a>
</div>
<div class="form-card">
    <div class="form-card-header">
        <i class="fas fa-file-invoice-dollar"></i>
        <h4 data-lang="edit_invoice_data">تعديل بيانات الفاتورة</h4>

    <div class="form-card-body">
        <form asp-action="Edit" method="post">
            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()

                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="status">الحالة</label> <span class="required">*</span>
                    <select asp-for="Invoice_Status" class="form-select" id="statusSelect" onchange="onStatusChange()">
                        <option value="1" data-lang="invoice_unpaid">غير مدفوعة</option>
                        <option value="0" data-lang="invoice_paid">مدفوعة</option>
                        <option value="2" data-lang="invoice_partial">مدفوعة جزئياً</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="due_date">تاريخ الاستحقاق</label>
                    <input asp-for="Due_Date" type="date" class="form-control" />
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="tax_percent">الضريبة (%)</label>
                    <input asp-for="Tax" type="number" step="0.01" min="0" max="100"
                           class="form-control" id="taxPercent" oninput="calcFinal()" />
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="discount_percent">الخصم (%)</label>
                    <input asp-for="Discount" type="number" step="0.01" min="0" max="100"
                           class="form-control" id="discountPercent" oninput="calcFinal()" />
                </div>

                @* ── AMOUNT PAID (shown only when PartiallyPaid) ── *@
                <div class="form-group" id="amountPaidRow" style="display:@(Model.Invoice_Status == InvoiceStatus.PartiallyPaid ? "block" : "none")">
                    <label data-lang="amount_paid">المبلغ المدفوع (ج.م)</label> <span style="color:red">*</span>
                    <input asp-for="Paid_Amount" type="number" step="0.01" min="0"
                           class="form-control" id="amountPaidInput"
                           placeholder="0.00" oninput="calcRemaining()" />
                    <span asp-validation-for="Paid_Amount" class="text-danger"></span>
                </div>
            </div>

                    </div>
                    <div class="invoice-summary-item invoice-summary-final" id="rowRemaining" style="display:@(Model.Invoice_Status == InvoiceStatus.PartiallyPaid ? "flex" : "none")">
                        <div class="invoice-summary-label" style="color:#c62828;" data-lang="remaining_amount">المبلغ المتبقي</div>
                        <div class="invoice-summary-value" id="dispRemaining" style="color:#c62828;">0.00 ج.م</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="invoice-summary-item" id="rowPaid" style="display:@(Model.Invoice_Status == InvoiceStatus.PartiallyPaid ? "flex" : "none")">
                        <div class="invoice-summary-label" style="color:#2e7d32;" data-lang="amount_paid">المبلغ المدفوع</div>
                        <div class="invoice-summary-value" id="dispPaid" style="color:#2e7d32;">0.00 ج.م</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

                   asp-route-id="@Model.ProjectId" class="btn-bonyan-primary">
                    <i class="fas fa-times"></i> <span data-lang="cancel">إلغاء</span>
                </a>
                <button type="submit" class="btn-bonyan-secondary">
                    <i class="fas fa-save"></i> <span data-lang="save_changes">حفظ التعديلات</span>
                </button>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        function calcFinal() {
            var total    = parseFloat(document.getElementById('totalAmount')?.value)    || 0;
            var taxPct   = parseFloat(document.getElementById('taxPercent')?.value)     || 0;
            var discPct  = parseFloat(document.getElementById('discountPercent')?.value) || 0;

            var discAmt = total * discPct / 100;
            var afterDisc = total - discAmt;
            var taxAmt  = afterDisc * taxPct / 100;
            var final   = afterDisc + taxAmt;

            var setEl = function (id, val) {
                var el = document.getElementById(id);
                if (el) el.textContent = val.toFixed(2) + ' ج.م';
            };
            setEl('dispTotal', total);
            setEl('dispDisc',  discAmt);
            setEl('dispTax',   taxAmt);
            setEl('dispFinal', final);

            calcRemaining();
        }

        function onStatusChange() {
            var status = document.getElementById('statusSelect').value;
            var row    = document.getElementById('amountPaidRow');
            var rowR   = document.getElementById('rowRemaining');
            var rowP   = document.getElementById('rowPaid');

            if (status === '2') {
                row.style.display  = 'block';
                rowR.style.display = 'flex';
                rowP.style.display = 'flex';
            } else {
                row.style.display  = 'none';
                rowR.style.display = 'none';
                rowP.style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('amountPaidInput').value = '';
            }
            calcRemaining();
        }

        function calcRemaining() {
            var finalEl   = document.getElementById('dispFinal');
            var finalText = finalEl ? finalEl.textContent.replace(' ج.م', '').trim() : '0';
            var final     = parseFloat(finalText) || 0;
            var paid      = parseFloat(document.getElementById('amountPaidInput')?.value) || 0;

            if (paid > final) {
                paid = final;
                document.getElementById('amountPaidInput').value = final.toFixed(2);
            }

            var remaining = final - paid;
            var setEl = function(id, val) {
                var el = document.getElementById(id);
                if (el) el.textContent = val.toFixed(2) + ' ج.م';
            };
            setEl('dispPaid',      paid);
            setEl('dispRemaining', remaining);
        }

        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', calcFinal);
    </script>
}

﻿@model IEnumerable<Bonyan.DAL.Models.Invoice>
@using Bonyan.DAL.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "الفواتير";
    var role = Context.Session.GetString("Role");
    var projects = ViewBag.Projects as List<Bonyan.DAL.Models.Project> ?? new();
    int? selectedProjectId = ViewBag.SelectedProjectId as int?;

    var invoicesList = Model?.ToList() ?? new List<Bonyan.DAL.Models.Invoice>();
    int totalCount = invoicesList.Count;
    decimal totalAmount = invoicesList.Sum(i => i.Total_Amount ?? 0);
    int unpaidCount = invoicesList.Count(i => i.Invoice_Status == InvoiceStatus.Unpaid);
    int overdueCount = invoicesList.Count(i => i.Invoice_Status != InvoiceStatus.Paid
        && i.Due_Date.HasValue && i.Due_Date.Value < DateTime.Today);
    decimal totalPaid = invoicesList.Sum(i => i.Paid_Amount ?? 0);
    decimal totalRemaining = invoicesList.Sum(i => i.RemainingAmount ?? 0);
}

                        <option value="Ton">طن (Ton)</option>
                        <option value="Meter">متر</option>
                        <option value="SquareMeter">متر مربع</option>
                        <option value="CubicMeter">متر مكعب</option>
                        <option value="Piece">قطعة</option>
                    </select>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="unit_price">سعر الوحدة (ج.م)</label>
                    <input asp-for="UnitPrice" type="number" step="0.01" min="0"
                           class="form-control" id="unitPrice" placeholder="0.00"
                           oninput="calcTotal()" />
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="quantity_required">الكمية المطلوبة</label>
                    <input asp-for="Quantity" type="number" step="0.001" min="0"
                           class="form-control" id="qty" placeholder="0.000"
                           oninput="calcTotal()" />
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="total_egp">الإجمالي (ج.م)</label>
                    <input type="text" id="totalDisplay" readonly class="form-control"
                           style="background:#f0f7ff; font-weight:700; color:var(--secondary)"
                           value="0.00" />
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>
                        <span data-lang="volume_factor">معامل الحجم (م³/وحدة)</span>
                        <span style="font-size:0.73rem; color:#888; font-weight:400" data-lang="volume_factor_hint">
                            — لحساب سعة المخزن
                        </span>
                    </label>
                    <input asp-for="VolumeFactorM3" type="number" step="0.0001" min="0"
                           class="form-control" id="volFactor" placeholder="1.0000" />
                    <div id="volHint" style="font-size:0.76rem; color:#888; margin-top:3px"></div>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="target_warehouse">المخزن المستهدف</label>
                    <select asp-for="TargetInventoryID" class="form-control">
                        <option value="" data-lang="choose_warehouse_option">-- اختر المخزن --</option>
                        @foreach (var inv in inventories)
                        {
                            <option value="@inv.InventoryID">
                                @inv.InventoryName
                                @(!string.IsNullOrEmpty(inv.Location) ? $"({inv.Location})" : "")
                                @(inv.Capacity.HasValue ? $"— {inv.Capacity.Value:N0} م³" : "")
                            </option>
                        }
                    </select>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group" style="grid-column:1/-1">
                    <label data-lang="description">الوصف</label>
                    <textarea asp-for="Description" class="form-control" rows="2"
                              placeholder="وصف مختصر..."></textarea>
                </div>

            </div>

            <!-- Supplier section -->
            <div style="margin:20px 0">
                <label style="font-weight:700; color:var(--primary); font-size:1rem;
                               display:block; margin-bottom:8px">
                    <i class="fas fa-truck"></i> <span data-lang="choose_supplier">اختر المورد</span>
                    <span style="font-size:0.78rem; color:#888; font-weight:400" data-lang="suppliers_filtered_hint">
                        — يُعرض الموردون الذين يورّدون هذه المادة فقط
                    </span>
                </label>
                <div id="supplierContainer">
                    <div style="color:#aaa; font-size:0.88rem; padding:14px;
                                background:#f9f9f9; border-radius:8px; border:1px dashed #ddd">
                        <i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i> <span data-lang="select_material_type_first">اختر نوع المادة أولاً</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <input type="hidden" asp-for="PreferredSupplierID" id="preferredSupplierID" />
            </div>

            <!-- Auto-invoice notice -->
            <div id="invoiceNotice"
                 style="display:none; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#e8f5e9,#e3f2fd);
                        border-radius:10px; padding:18px; margin:16px 0;
                        border:1px solid #c8e6c9">
                <div style="font-weight:700; color:var(--primary); margin-bottom:10px; font-size:0.95rem">
                    <i class="fas fa-file-invoice" style="color:var(--secondary)"></i>
                    <span data-lang="auto_invoice_notice">✓ سيتم إنشاء فاتورة تلقائياً عند الحفظ</span>
                </div>
                <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
                            gap:10px; font-size:0.85rem">
                    <div><span style="color:#888">المادة: </span><strong id="notMat">—</strong></div>
                    <div><span style="color:#888">الحساب: </span><strong id="notCalc">—</strong></div>
                    <div>
                        <span style="color:#888">الإجمالي: </span>
                        <strong id="notTotal" style="color:var(--secondary)">—</strong>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="form-actions">
                <a asp-action="Index" class="btn-bonyan-primary">
                    <i class="fas fa-times"></i> <span data-lang="cancel">إلغاء</span>
                </a>
                <button type="button" class="btn-bonyan-secondary" onclick="interceptSubmit(event)">
                    <i class="fas fa-save"></i> <span data-lang="save_material_invoice">حفظ المادة وإنشاء الفاتورة</span>
                </button>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <div id="capModal" style="display:none; position:fixed; inset:0;
             background:rgba(0,0,0,.55); z-index:9999; align-items:center; justify-content:center;">
        <div style="background:#fff; border-radius:16px; padding:32px 28px;
                        max-width:520px; width:94%; box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.25);
                        direction:rtl; text-align:right; position:relative;">
            <div id="cmIcon" style="font-size:2.4rem; text-align:center; margin-bottom:8px;"></div>
            <h4 id="cmTitle" style="margin:0 0 8px; color:#2C3E6B; font-size:1.1rem; text-align:center;"></h4>
            <p id="cmBody" style="margin:0 0 18px; color:#555; font-size:0.9rem; line-height:1.7; text-align:center;"></p>

            <div id="cmSecSection" style="display:none; margin-bottom:18px;">
                <label style="font-weight:600; font-size:0.88rem; color:#444; margin-bottom:6px; display:block;">
                    اختر المخزن البديل:
                </label>
                <select id="cmSecSelect" class="form-control" style="width:100%;"></select>
                <div id="cmSecHint" style="font-size:0.8rem; color:#e53935; margin-top:5px;"></div>
            </div>

            <div id="cmActions" style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px;"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
        //  Keep ALL original functions exactly as they were
        // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
        var allSuppliers = [
            @foreach (var s in allSuppliers)
            {
                            @Html.Raw($"{{id:{s.SupplierID},name:'{s.SupplierName.Replace("'", "\\'")}',phone:'{s.Phone ?? ""}',types:'{s.SuppliedMaterialTypes ?? ""}'}},")
            }
        ];

        var volFactors = { Steel: 0.55, Sand: 1.0, Cement: 0.85, Bricks: 1.25, Others: 1.0 };
        var volHints = {
            Steel:  'حديد: 1 طن ≈ 0.55 م³',
            Sand:   'رمل: 1 م³ = 1.0 م³',
            Cement: 'أسمنت: 1 طن ≈ 0.85 م³',
            Bricks: 'طوب: 1000 قطعة ≈ 1.25 م³',
            Others: 'أدخل المعامل المناسب'
        };

        function onMatTypeChange(val) {
            document.getElementById('customNameWrap').style.display = val === 'Others' ? 'block' : 'none';
            document.getElementById('volFactor').value = (volFactors[val] || 1.0).toFixed(4);
            document.getElementById('volHint').textContent = volHints[val] || '';
            renderSuppliers(val);
            updateNotice();
        }

        function renderSuppliers(matType) {
            var container = document.getElementById('supplierContainer');
            document.getElementById('preferredSupplierID').value = '';

            if (!matType) {
                container.innerHTML = '<div style="color:#aaa;font-size:0.88rem;padding:14px;background:#f9f9f9;border-radius:8px;border:1px dashed #ddd"><i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i> اختر نوع المادة أولاً</div>';
                return;
            }

            var matching = allSuppliers.filter(function (s) {
                if (!s.types) return false;
                return s.types.split(',').some(function (t) {
                    t = t.trim();
                    if (matType === 'Others') return t === 'Others' || t.startsWith('Others:');
                    return t === matType;
                });
            });

            if (matching.length === 0) {
                container.innerHTML = '<div style="color:#c62828;font-size:0.88rem;padding:14px;background:#fff3f3;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #ffcdd2"><i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i> لا يوجد موردون لهذه المادة. يرجى إضافة مورد من صفحة الموردين.</div>';
                return;
            }

            var html = '<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px">';
            matching.forEach(function (s) {
                html += '<label class="supplier-card" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;padding:14px 18px;background:#fff;border:2px solid var(--secondary);border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s">'
                    + '<input type="radio" name="_supRadio" value="' + s.id + '" onchange="selectSupplier(' + s.id + ',this)" style="width:18px;height:18px;accent-color:var(--primary)">'
                    + '<div><div style="font-weight:700;color:var(--primary);font-size:0.95rem">' + s.name + '</div>'
                    + (s.phone ? '<div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:#888"><i class="fas fa-phone"></i> ' + s.phone + '</div>' : '')
                    + '</div></label>';
            });
            html += '</div>';
            container.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function selectSupplier(id, radio) {
            document.getElementById('preferredSupplierID').value = id;
            document.querySelectorAll('.supplier-card').forEach(function (c) {
                c.style.borderColor = '#e8e8e8';
                c.style.background = '#fff';
            });
            radio.closest('.supplier-card').style.borderColor = 'var(--secondary)';
            radio.closest('.supplier-card').style.background = '#e8f5e9';
            updateNotice();
        }

        function calcTotal() {
            var p = parseFloat(document.getElementById('unitPrice').value) || 0;
            var q = parseFloat(document.getElementById('qty').value) || 0;
            var t = p * q;
            document.getElementById('totalDisplay').value = t.toFixed(2);
            updateNotice();
            return t;
        }

        function updateNotice() {
            var suppId  = document.getElementById('preferredSupplierID').value;
            var qty     = parseFloat(document.getElementById('qty').value) || 0;
            var price   = parseFloat(document.getElementById('unitPrice').value) || 0;
            var matType = document.getElementById('matTypeSelect').value;
            var total   = qty * price;
            var notice  = document.getElementById('invoiceNotice');
            if (suppId && qty > 0 && price > 0 && matType) {
                notice.style.display = 'block';
                document.getElementById('notMat').textContent   = matType;
                document.getElementById('notCalc').textContent  = qty.toFixed(3) + ' × ' + price.toFixed(2) + ' ج.م';
                document.getElementById('notTotal').textContent = total.toFixed(2) + ' ج.م';
            } else {
                notice.style.display = 'none';
            }
        }

        // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
        //  NEW: intercept submit → capacity check first
        // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
        function interceptSubmit(e) {
            // Run original name validation first
            var matType = document.getElementById('matTypeSelect').value;
            if (matType === 'Others') {
                var custom = document.getElementById('customName').value.trim();
                if (!custom) { alert('يرجى كتابة اسم المادة الأخرى'); return; }
                document.getElementById('matTypeSelect').value = custom;
            }

            var invSel = document.querySelector('[name="TargetInventoryID"]');
            var invId  = invSel ? invSel.value : '';
            var qty    = parseFloat(document.getElementById('qty').value) || 0;
            var vol    = parseFloat(document.getElementById('volFactor').value) || 1.0;

            // No inventory selected or no quantity → submit normally
            if (!invId || qty <= 0) {
                document.getElementById('matForm').submit();
                return;
            }

            // Call the capacity check API
            fetch('/Material/CheckInventoryCapacity?inventoryId=' + invId + '&quantity=' + qty + '&volumeFactor=' + vol)
                .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
                .then(function(result){
                    if (result.status === 'ok') {
                        document.getElementById('hdnDecision').value = 'ok';
                        document.getElementById('matForm').submit();
                    } else if (result.status === 'full') {
                        showFullModal(result, invId, qty, vol);
                    } else if (result.status === 'partial') {
                        showPartialModal(result, invId, qty, vol);
                    } else {
                        document.getElementById('matForm').submit();
                    }
                })
                .catch(function(){ document.getElementById('matForm').submit(); });
        }

        // ── FULL modal (zero capacity) ─────────────────────
        function showFullModal(result, invId, qty, vol) {
            document.getElementById('cmIcon').textContent  = '⛔';
            document.getElementById('cmTitle').textContent = 'المخزن ممتلئ!';
            document.getElementById('cmBody').innerHTML =
                'لا توجد مساحة متاحة في مخزن <strong>' + result.inventoryName + '</strong>.<br>' +
                'الحجم المطلوب: <strong>' + result.neededM3.toFixed(2) + ' م³</strong> — المتاح: <strong>0 م³</strong>.<br>' +
                'يجب اختيار مخزن آخر لتخزين الكمية كاملة.';

            document.getElementById('cmSecSection').style.display = 'block';
            loadAltInventories(invId, qty, vol, true);

            document.getElementById('cmActions').innerHTML =
                '<button onclick="confirmMove()" class="btn-bonyan-secondary" style="width:100%">' +
                '<i class="fas fa-warehouse"></i> تخزين الكمية في مخزن آخر</button>' +
                '<button onclick="closeCapModal()" style="border:none;background:none;color:#888;' +
                'cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;text-align:center;padding:6px;">إلغاء / تعديل البيانات</button>';

            openCapModal();
        }

        // ── PARTIAL modal (some capacity but not enough) ───
        function showPartialModal(result, invId, qty, vol) {
            document.getElementById('cmIcon').textContent  = '⚠️';
            document.getElementById('cmTitle').textContent = 'المساحة غير كافية!';
            document.getElementById('cmBody').innerHTML =
                'مخزن <strong>' + result.inventoryName + '</strong> يتوفر فيه <strong>' +
                result.availableM3.toFixed(2) + ' م³</strong> فقط، لكن المادة تحتاج <strong>' +
                result.neededM3.toFixed(2) + ' م³</strong>.<br><br>' +
                'يمكن تخزين <strong>' + result.availableQty + ' وحدة</strong> هنا، ' +
                'والباقي <strong>' + result.remainingQty + ' وحدة</strong> في مخزن آخر.';

            document.getElementById('cmSecSection').style.display = 'block';
            loadAltInventories(invId, result.remainingQty, vol, false);

            var aq = result.availableQty;
            var rq = result.remainingQty;
            document.getElementById('cmActions').innerHTML =
                '<button onclick="confirmSplit(' + aq + ',' + rq + ')" class="btn-bonyan-secondary" style="width:100%;background:#2C3E6B">' +
                '<i class="fas fa-compress-arrows-alt"></i> تخزين ' + aq + ' وحدة هنا + ' + rq + ' وحدة في مخزن آخر</button>' +
                '<button onclick="confirmMove()" class="btn-bonyan-secondary" style="width:100%;background:#8B5E3C">' +
                '<i class="fas fa-warehouse"></i> تخزين الكمية كاملة (' + qty + ' وحدة) في مخزن آخر فقط</button>' +
                '<button onclick="closeCapModal()" style="border:none;background:none;color:#888;' +
                'cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;text-align:center;padding:6px;">إلغاء / تعديل البيانات</button>';

            openCapModal();
        }

        // ── Load alternative inventories into picker ────────
        function loadAltInventories(excludeId, qtyNeeded, vol, mustFitAll) {
            var sel  = document.getElementById('cmSecSelect');
            var hint = document.getElementById('cmSecHint');
            sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">جاري التحميل...</option>';

            fetch('/Material/GetInventoriesWithCapacity?volumeFactor=' + vol + '&quantity=' + qtyNeeded)
                .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
                .then(function(list){
                    sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- اختر مخزناً بديلاً --</option>';
                    var count = 0;
                    list.forEach(function(inv){
                        if (inv.inventoryID == excludeId) return;
                        if (mustFitAll && !inv.canFitAll)  return;
                        var o = document.createElement('option');
                        o.value = inv.inventoryID;
                        var avail = inv.availableM3 != null
                            ? 'متاح: ' + inv.availableM3.toFixed(1) + ' م³'
                            : 'غير محدود';
                        o.textContent = inv.inventoryName + ' — ' + avail + (inv.canFitAll ? ' ✅' : ' ⚠️');
                        sel.appendChild(o);
                        count++;
                    });
                    if (count === 0) {
                        sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">⛔ لا توجد مخازن بديلة</option>';
                        hint.textContent = 'لا يوجد مخزن لديه سعة كافية. يرجى تعديل الكمية أو إضافة مخزن.';
                    } else {
                        hint.textContent = '';
                    }
                })
                .catch(function(){
                    sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- خطأ في التحميل --</option>';
                });
        }

        function confirmSplit(primaryQty, secondaryQty) {
            var secId = document.getElementById('cmSecSelect').value;
            if (!secId) { alert('يرجى اختيار مخزن بديل أولاً'); return; }
            document.getElementById('hdnDecision').value       = 'split';
            document.getElementById('hdnSecondaryInv').value   = secId;
            document.getElementById('hdnSplitPrimary').value   = primaryQty;
            document.getElementById('hdnSplitSecondary').value = secondaryQty;
            closeCapModal();
            document.getElementById('matForm').submit();
        }

        function confirmMove() {
            var secId = document.getElementById('cmSecSelect').value;
            if (!secId) { alert('يرجى اختيار مخزن بديل أولاً'); return; }
            document.getElementById('hdnDecision').value       = 'move';
            document.getElementById('hdnSecondaryInv').value   = secId;
            document.getElementById('hdnSplitPrimary').value   = '';
            document.getElementById('hdnSplitSecondary').value = '';
            closeCapModal();
            document.getElementById('matForm').submit();
        }

        function openCapModal()  { var m=document.getElementById('capModal'); m.style.display='flex'; }
        function closeCapModal() { document.getElementById('capModal').style.display='none'; }

        document.getElementById('capModal').addEventListener('click', function(e){
            if (e.target === this) closeCapModal();
        });
    </script>
}
