            <span data-lang="material_suppliers_sub"></span>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="details-body" style="padding-bottom:4px">
        @if (Model.MaterialSuppliers != null && Model.MaterialSuppliers.Any())
        {
            <div class="mat-table-wrap">
            <table class="mat-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th data-lang="supplier">المورد</th>
                        <th data-lang="contact_person">شخص التواصل</th>
                        <th data-lang="phone">الهاتف</th>
                        <th data-lang="supply_price">سعر التوريد</th>
                        <th data-lang="last_supply">آخر توريد</th>
                        @if (role == "Admin")
                        {
                            <th data-lang="actions">إجراءات</th>
                        }
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var ms in Model.MaterialSuppliers)
                    {
                        <tr>
                            <td>
                                <a asp-controller="Supplier" asp-action="Details"
                                   asp-route-id="@ms.SupplierID" class="mat-link">
                                    @ms.Supplier?.SupplierName
                                </a>
                            </td>
                            <td>@(ms.Supplier?.ContactPerson ?? "—")</td>
                            <td>@(ms.Supplier?.Phone ?? "—")</td>
                            <td class="mat-price">@(ms.SupplyPrice.HasValue ? ms.SupplyPrice.Value.ToString("N2") + " ج.م" : "—")</td>
                            <td>@(ms.LastSupplyDate.HasValue ? ms.LastSupplyDate.Value.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd") : "—")</td>
                            @if (role == "Admin")
                            {
                                <td>
                                    <form asp-action="RemoveSupplier" method="post" class="mat-inline-form"
                                          onsubmit="return confirm('إزالة هذا المورد من المادة؟')">
                                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                                        <input type="hidden" name="materialId" value="@Model.MaterialID" />
                                        <input type="hidden" name="supplierId" value="@ms.SupplierID" />
                                        <button type="submit" class="mat-action-btn danger" title="إزالة">
                                            <i class="fas fa-unlink"></i>
                                        </button>
                                    </form>
                                </td>
                            }
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
            </div>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="mat-empty" data-lang="no_linked_suppliers">لا يوجد موردون مرتبطون بهذه المادة</div>
        }
    </div>

    @if (role == "Admin" && availableSuppliers.Any())
    {
        <div class="mat-add-section">
            <div class="mat-add-title"><i class="fas fa-plus-circle"></i> <span data-lang="link_new_supplier">ربط مورد جديد</span></div>
            <form asp-action="AddSupplier" method="post">
                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
                <input type="hidden" name="materialId" value="@Model.MaterialID" />
                <div class="form-grid-3">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label data-lang="supplier">المورد <span style="color:red">*</span></label>
                        <select name="supplierId" class="form-control" required>
                            <option value="" data-lang="choose_supplier_option2">-- اختر مورداً --</option>
                            @foreach (var s in availableSuppliers)
                            {
                                <option value="@s.SupplierID">@s.SupplierName</option>
                            }
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label data-lang="supply_price">سعر التوريد (ج.م)</label>
                        <input type="number" name="supplyPrice" step="0.01" min="0" class="form-control" placeholder="0.00" />
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label data-lang="last_supply_date">تاريخ آخر توريد</label>
                        <input type="date" name="lastSupplyDate" class="form-control" />
                    </div>
                </div>
                <button type="submit" class="btn-bonyan-secondary" style="margin-top:6px">
                    <i class="fas fa-link"></i> <span data-lang="link_supplier">ربط المورد</span>
                </button>
            </form>
        </div>
    }
</div>

@if (Model.MaterialTasks != null && Model.MaterialTasks.Any())
{
    <div class="details-card" style="margin-top:20px">
        <div class="details-header" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#4a1a5f,#7b2d8e)">
            <div class="details-proj-icon" style="width:54px;height:54px;font-size:1.3rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15)">
                <i class="fas fa-clipboard-list"></i>
            </div>
            <div class="details-header-info">
                <h3><span data-lang="material_requests">طلبات المادة</span> <span class="badge-count">@Model.MaterialTasks.Count</span></h3>
                <span data-lang="material_tasks_sub">طلبات المادة في المشاريع</span>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="details-body">
            <div class="mat-table-wrap">
            <table class="mat-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th data-lang="task_name_label">المهمة</th>
                        <th data-lang="project">المشروع</th>
                        <th data-lang="quantity_required">الكمية المطلوبة</th>
                        <th data-lang="quantity_used">الكمية المستخدمة</th>
                        <th data-lang="status">الحالة</th>
                        <th data-lang="request_date">تاريخ الطلب</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var mt in Model.MaterialTasks)
                    {
                        string statusLabel = mt.Status switch
                        {
                            MaterialTaskStatus.Requested => "مطلوب",
                            MaterialTaskStatus.Approved => "معتمد",
                            MaterialTaskStatus.Delivered => "تم التسليم",
                            _ => mt.Status.ToString()
                        };
                        string statusClass = mt.Status switch
                        {
                            MaterialTaskStatus.Requested => "badge-pending",
                            MaterialTaskStatus.Approved => "badge-inprogress",
                            MaterialTaskStatus.Delivered => "badge-completed",
                            _ => ""
                        };
                        <tr>
                            <td>@(mt.Task?.Task_Name ?? "—")</td>
                            <td>@(mt.Task?.Project?.ProjectName ?? "—")</td>
                            <td class="mat-qty">@mt.QuantityRequired.ToString("N2")</td>
                            <td class="mat-qty">@(mt.QuantityUsed.HasValue ? mt.QuantityUsed.Value.ToString("N2") : "—")</td>
                            <td><span class="task-status-badge @statusClass" data-en="@mt.Status.ToString()" data-ar="@statusLabel">@statusLabel</span></td>
                            <td>@mt.RequestDate.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")</td>
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>
            </table>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
}

﻿@* Views/Material/Edit.cshtml *@
@model Bonyan.DAL.Models.Material
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "تعديل مادة";
    var suppliers = ViewBag.Suppliers as List<Bonyan.DAL.Models.Supplier> ?? new();
    var inventories = ViewBag.Inventories as List<Bonyan.DAL.Models.Inventory> ?? new();
}

<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/employee.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/material.css" />

<div class="page-header">
    <div class="page-header-left">
        <h2>
            <i class="fas fa-edit" style="color:var(--secondary)"></i>
            <span data-lang="edit_colon">تعديل:</span> @Model.MaterialName
        </h2>
    </div>
    <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@Model.MaterialID" class="btn-bonyan-primary">
        <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i> <span data-lang="back_to_details">رجوع للتفاصيل</span>
    </a>
</div>

<div class="form-card">
    <div class="form-card-header">
        <i class="fas fa-cube"></i>
        <h4 data-lang="edit_material_data">تعديل بيانات المادة</h4>
    </div>
    <div class="form-card-body">
        <form asp-action="Edit" method="post">
            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
            <input type="hidden" asp-for="MaterialID" />

            <div class="form-section-title" data-lang="material_data">بيانات المادة</div>
            <div class="form-grid-2">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="material_name_label">اسم المادة</label> <span style="color:red">*</span>
                    <input asp-for="MaterialName" class="form-control" required />
                    <span asp-validation-for="MaterialName" class="text-danger"></span>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="measurement_unit">وحدة القياس</label>
                    <select asp-for="Unit" class="form-control">
                        <option value="" data-lang="choose_unit_option">-- اختر الوحدة --</option>
                        <option value="Kg" data-lang="unit_kg">كيلوجرام</option>
                        <option value="Ton" data-lang="unit_ton">طن</option>
                        <option value="Meter" data-lang="unit_meter">متر</option>
                        <option value="SquareMeter" data-lang="unit_sqmeter">متر مربع</option>
                        <option value="CubicMeter" data-lang="unit_cubmeter">متر مكعب</option>
                        <option value="Piece" data-lang="unit_piece">قطعة</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="unit_price">سعر الوحدة (ج.م)</label>
                    <input asp-for="UnitPrice" type="number" step="0.01" min="0"
                           class="form-control" id="unitPrice" oninput="calcTotal()" />
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="quantity">الكمية</label>
                    <input asp-for="Quantity" type="number" step="0.001" min="0"
                           class="form-control" id="quantity" oninput="calcTotal()" />
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="total_egp">الإجمالي (ج.م)</label>
                    <input type="text" id="totalAmount" class="form-control" readonly
                           style="background:#f5f5f5; font-weight:700; color:var(--primary)"
                           value="@((Model.UnitPrice ?? 0) * (Model.Quantity ?? 0))" />
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="preferred_supplier">المورد المفضل</label>
                    <select asp-for="PreferredSupplierID" class="form-control">
                        <option value="" data-lang="choose_supplier_option">-- اختر المورد --</option>
                        @foreach (var s in suppliers)
                        {
                            if (Model.PreferredSupplierID == s.SupplierID)
                            {
                                <option value="@s.SupplierID" selected>@s.SupplierName</option>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <option value="@s.SupplierID">@s.SupplierName</option>
                            }
                        }
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="target_warehouse">المخزن المستهدف</label>
                    <select asp-for="TargetInventoryID" class="form-control">
                        <option value="" data-lang="choose_warehouse_option">-- اختر المخزن --</option>
                        @foreach (var inv in inventories)
                        {
                            if (Model.TargetInventoryID == inv.InventoryID)
                            {
                                <option value="@inv.InventoryID" selected>
                                    @inv.InventoryName @(!string.IsNullOrEmpty(inv.Location) ? $"({inv.Location})" : "")
                                </option>
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                <option value="@inv.InventoryID">
                                    @inv.InventoryName @(!string.IsNullOrEmpty(inv.Location) ? $"({inv.Location})" : "")
                                </option>
                            }
                        }
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group" style="grid-column:1 / -1">
                    <label data-lang="description">الوصف</label>
                    <textarea asp-for="Description" class="form-control" rows="3"></textarea>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="form-actions">
                <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@Model.MaterialID" class="btn-bonyan-primary">
                    <i class="fas fa-times"></i> <span data-lang="cancel">إلغاء</span>
                </a>
                <button type="submit" class="btn-bonyan-secondary">
                    <i class="fas fa-save"></i> <span data-lang="save_changes">حفظ التعديلات</span>
                </button>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        function calcTotal() {
            var price = parseFloat(document.getElementById('unitPrice').value) || 0;
            var qty = parseFloat(document.getElementById('quantity').value) || 0;
            document.getElementById('totalAmount').value = (price * qty).toFixed(2);
        }
    </script>
}
=== File: ./BonyanForEngineeringConsultingFirms/Views/Material/Index.cshtml ===
﻿@model IEnumerable<Bonyan.DAL.Models.Material>
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "المواد";
    var role = Context.Session.GetString("Role");
    string search = ViewBag.Search ?? "";

    var materialsList = Model?.ToList() ?? new List<Bonyan.DAL.Models.Material>();
    int totalCount = materialsList.Count;
    int withSuppliers = materialsList.Count(m => m.MaterialSuppliers.Any());
    int totalSupplierLinks = materialsList.Sum(m => m.MaterialSuppliers.Count);
    int totalInventoryEntries = materialsList.Sum(m => m.MaterialInventories.Count);
}

<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/material.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/employee.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/employee-dark.css" />

    [dir="ltr"] .emp-table thead th { text-align: left; }
    [dir="ltr"] .emp-table thead th i { margin-left: 0; margin-right: 5px; }
</style>

@* ── DEBUG LOG — remove this block after fixing the issue ── *@
@if (TempData["DebugLog"] != null)
{
    var logs = TempData["DebugLog"].ToString().Split('|');
    <div style="background:#1e1e2e; color:#cdd6f4; border-radius:12px;
                        padding:20px 24px; margin-bottom:22px; font-family:monospace;
                        font-size:0.82rem; line-height:1.8; direction:ltr; text-align:left">
        <div style="color:#89b4fa; font-weight:700; font-size:0.95rem; margin-bottom:10px">
            🔍 Debug Log — Material Create
        </div>
        @foreach (var log in logs)
        {
            string color = log.StartsWith("✅") ? "#a6e3a1"
            : log.StartsWith("❌") ? "#f38ba8"
            : log.StartsWith("⚠️") ? "#fab387"
            : "#cdd6f4";
            <div style="color:@color">@log</div>
        }
    </div>
}

                                               class="btn-action edit" data-tip-ar="تعديل" data-tip-en="Edit" data-tip="تعديل">
                                                <i class="fas fa-edit"></i>
                                            </a>
                                            <a asp-action="Delete" asp-route-id="@m.MaterialID"
                                               class="btn-action delete"
                                               data-tip-ar="حذف" data-tip-en="Delete" data-tip="حذف">
                                                <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                                            </a>
                                        </div>
                                    </td>
                                }
                            </tr>
                        }
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="empty-state">
                <i class="fas fa-boxes"></i>
                <p>@(!string.IsNullOrEmpty(search) ? Html.Raw("<span data-lang=\"no_materials_match\">لا توجد مواد تطابق البحث</span>") : Html.Raw("<span data-lang=\"no_materials\">لا توجد مواد حتى الآن</span>"))</p>
            </div>
        }
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        document.addEventListener('languageChanged', function (e) {
            var lang = e.detail.lang;
            document.querySelectorAll('[data-tip-ar]').forEach(function (el) {
                el.setAttribute('data-tip', lang === 'ar' ? el.dataset.tipAr : el.dataset.tipEn);
            });
        });
    </script>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        // ── Supplier loader via AJAX ───────────────────────────────
        var materialSelect = document.getElementById('materialSelect');
        var supplierSelect = document.getElementById('supplierSelect');
        var supplierHint   = document.getElementById('supplierHint');

        if (materialSelect) {
            materialSelect.addEventListener('change', function () {
                var matId = this.value;

                supplierSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- جاري التحميل... --</option>';
                if (supplierHint) supplierHint.style.display = 'none';

                if (!matId) {
                    supplierSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- اختر المادة أولاً --</option>';
                    calcFinal();
                    return;
                }

                fetch('/MaterialInvoice/GetSuppliersForMaterial?materialId=' + matId)
                    .then(function (r) { return r.json(); })
                    .then(function (data) {
                        supplierSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- اختر المورد --</option>';
                        if (data.length === 0) {
                            if (supplierHint) supplierHint.style.display = 'block';
                        } else {
                            data.forEach(function (s) {
                                var opt = document.createElement('option');
                                opt.value = s.supplierID;
                                opt.textContent = s.supplierName;
                                supplierSelect.appendChild(opt);
                            });
                        }
                    })
                    .catch(function () {
                        supplierSelect.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- خطأ في تحميل الموردين --</option>';
                    });

                // auto-fill unit price and quantity from data attributes
                var selected = materialSelect.options[materialSelect.selectedIndex];
                var price    = selected ? selected.getAttribute('data-price') : null;
                var qty      = selected ? selected.getAttribute('data-qty')   : null;
                var priceEl  = document.querySelector('[name="UnitPrice"]');
                var qtyEl    = document.querySelector('[name="Quantity"]');
                if (priceEl && price) priceEl.value = price;
                if (qtyEl   && qty)   qtyEl.value   = qty;

                calcFinal();
            });
        }

        // ── Calculation ───────────────────────────────────────────
        function calcFinal() {
            var qty      = parseFloat(document.querySelector('[name="Quantity"]')?.value)        || 0;
            var price    = parseFloat(document.querySelector('[name="UnitPrice"]')?.value)       || 0;
            var tax      = parseFloat(document.getElementById('TaxPercent')?.value)     || 0;
            var discount = parseFloat(document.getElementById('DiscountPercent')?.value) || 0;

            var total   = qty * price;
            var taxAmt  = total * tax / 100;
            var discAmt = total * discount / 100;
            var final   = total + taxAmt - discAmt;

            var setEl = function (id, val) {
                var el = document.getElementById(id);
                if (el) el.textContent = val.toFixed(2) + ' ج.م';
            };
            setEl('dispTotal', total);
            setEl('dispTax',   taxAmt);
            setEl('dispDisc',  discAmt);
            setEl('dispFinal', final);

            calcRemaining(); // ← ADD THIS LINE

        }

        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', calcFinal);

        // ── Cancel modal ──────────────────────────────────────────
        function confirmCancelInvoice() {
            document.getElementById('cancelModal').classList.add('active');
        }
        function closeCancelModal() {
            document.getElementById('cancelModal').classList.remove('active');
        }
                // ── Partial payment logic ─────────────────────────────────────
        function onStatusChange() {
            var status = document.getElementById('statusSelect').value;
            var row    = document.getElementById('amountPaidRow');
            var rowR   = document.getElementById('rowRemaining');
            var rowP   = document.getElementById('rowPaid');

            if (status === '2') {          // PartiallyPaid
                row.style.display  = 'block';
                rowR.style.display = 'flex';
                rowP.style.display = 'flex';
            } else {
                row.style.display  = 'none';
                rowR.style.display = 'none';
                rowP.style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('amountPaidInput').value = '';
            }
            calcRemaining();
        }

        function calcRemaining() {
            var finalEl    = document.getElementById('dispFinal');
            var finalText  = finalEl ? finalEl.textContent.replace(' ج.م', '').trim() : '0';
            var final      = parseFloat(finalText) || 0;
            var paid       = parseFloat(document.getElementById('amountPaidInput')?.value) || 0;

            if (paid > final) {
                paid = final;
                document.getElementById('amountPaidInput').value = final.toFixed(2);
            }

            var remaining = final - paid;
            var setEl = function(id, val) {
                var el = document.getElementById(id);
                if (el) el.textContent = val.toFixed(2) + ' ج.م';
            };
            setEl('dispPaid',      paid);
            setEl('dispRemaining', remaining);
        }
    </script>
}

@model Bonyan.DAL.Models.MaterialInvoice
@using Bonyan.DAL.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "حذف فاتورة مادة";
    string statusAr = Model.Status switch
    {
        InvoiceStatus.Paid => "مدفوعة",
        InvoiceStatus.Unpaid => "غير مدفوعة",
        InvoiceStatus.PartiallyPaid => "مدفوعة جزئياً",
        _ => Model.Status.ToString()
    };
    string statusEn = Model.Status switch
    {
        InvoiceStatus.Paid => "Paid",
        InvoiceStatus.Unpaid => "Unpaid",
        InvoiceStatus.PartiallyPaid => "Partially Paid",
        _ => Model.Status.ToString()
    };
}

﻿@* Views/MaterialInvoice/Details.cshtml *@
@model Bonyan.DAL.Models.MaterialInvoice
@using Bonyan.DAL.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "تفاصيل فاتورة المادة";
    string statusLabel = Model.Status switch
    {
        InvoiceStatus.Paid => "مدفوعة",
        InvoiceStatus.Unpaid => "غير مدفوعة",
        InvoiceStatus.PartiallyPaid => "مدفوعة جزئياً",
        _ => Model.Status.ToString()
    };
    string statusClass = Model.Status switch
    {
        InvoiceStatus.Paid => "badge-completed",
        InvoiceStatus.Unpaid => "badge-pending",
        InvoiceStatus.PartiallyPaid => "badge-inprogress",
        _ => ""
    };
}

            <span class="badge-status @statusClass" data-en="@Model.Status.ToString()" data-ar="@statusLabel">@statusLabel</span>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="details-body">
        <div class="details-grid">
            <div class="detail-item">
                <label data-lang="material">المادة</label>
                <p>
                    <a asp-controller="Material" asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@Model.MaterialID" class="mi-link">
                        @(Model.Material?.MaterialName ?? "—")
                    </a>
                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.Material?.Unit))
                    {
                        <span class="unit-badge">@Model.Material.Unit</span>
                    }
                </p>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
                <label data-lang="supplier">المورد</label>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        function calcAll() {
            var qty = parseFloat(document.getElementById('qty').value) || 0;
            var price = parseFloat(document.getElementById('unitPrice').value) || 0;
            var taxPct = parseFloat(document.getElementById('tax').value) || 0;
            var discPct = parseFloat(document.getElementById('disc').value) || 0;
            var total = qty * price;
            var taxAmt = total * taxPct / 100;
            var discAmt = total * discPct / 100;
            var final = total + taxAmt - discAmt;
            document.getElementById('dispTotal').textContent = total.toFixed(2) + ' ج.م';
            document.getElementById('dispTax').textContent = taxAmt.toFixed(2) + ' ج.م';
            document.getElementById('dispDisc').textContent = discAmt.toFixed(2) + ' ج.م';
            document.getElementById('dispFinal').textContent = final.toFixed(2) + ' ج.م';
        }
        calcAll();
    </script>
}

﻿@* Views/MaterialInvoice/Index.cshtml *@
@model List<Bonyan.DAL.Models.MaterialInvoice>
@using Bonyan.DAL.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "فواتير المواد";
    var materials = ViewBag.Materials as List<Bonyan.DAL.Models.Material> ?? new();
    var suppliers = ViewBag.Suppliers as List<Bonyan.DAL.Models.Supplier> ?? new();
    int? selMat = ViewBag.SelectedMaterialId;
    int? selSup = ViewBag.SelectedSupplierId;
    int? selStat = ViewBag.SelectedStatus;
    decimal totalAmt = ViewBag.TotalAmount != null ? (decimal)ViewBag.TotalAmount : 0;
    decimal unpaidAmt = ViewBag.UnpaidAmount != null ? (decimal)ViewBag.UnpaidAmount : 0;
    int totalCount = ViewBag.TotalInvoices != null ? (int)ViewBag.TotalInvoices : 0;
    decimal paidAmt = totalAmt - unpaidAmt;
}

<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/material.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/materialinvoice.css" />

<div class="mi-page">

            <i class="fas fa-file-invoice-dollar"></i>

                    else

                    }

                <option value="" data-lang="all_statuses_option">— كل الحالات —</option>
                @if (selStat == 0)

                    <option value="0" selected="selected" data-lang="invoice_paid">✅ مدفوعة</option>
                }

                }
                @if (selStat == 1)
                {
                    <option value="1" selected="selected" data-lang="invoice_unpaid">❌ غير مدفوعة</option>
                }
                else

                    <option value="1" data-lang="invoice_unpaid">❌ غير مدفوعة</option>

            </a>

    </div>

    <!-- ── Table Card ──────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="mi-card">
        <div class="mi-card-head">
            <i class="fas fa-list-alt"></i>
            <span data-lang="invoices_list">قائمة الفواتير</span>
            <span class="count-badge">@Model.Count فاتورة</span>
        </div>

        @if (Model.Any())
        {
            <div style="overflow-x:auto">
                <table class="mi-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th><i class="fas fa-hashtag"></i> #</th>
                            <th><i class="fas fa-box"></i> <span data-lang="material">المادة</span></th>
                            <th><i class="fas fa-truck"></i> <span data-lang="supplier">المورد</span></th>
                            <th><i class="fas fa-cubes"></i> <span data-lang="quantity">الكمية</span></th>
                            <th><i class="fas fa-tag"></i> <span data-lang="unit_price">سعر الوحدة</span></th>
                            <th><i class="fas fa-calculator"></i> <span data-lang="mi_total">المجموع</span></th>
                            <th><i class="fas fa-percent"></i> <span data-lang="tax">ضريبة</span></th>
                            <th><i class="fas fa-percent"></i> <span data-lang="discount">خصم</span></th>
                            <th><i class="fas fa-coins"></i> <span data-lang="net">الصافي</span></th>
                            <th><i class="fas fa-calendar-alt"></i> <span data-lang="invoice_date">تاريخ الفاتورة</span></th>
                            <th><i class="fas fa-clock"></i> <span data-lang="due">الاستحقاق</span></th>
                            <th><i class="fas fa-circle"></i> <span data-lang="status">الحالة</span></th>
                            <th data-lang="actions">إجراءات</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        @foreach (var inv in Model)
                        {
                            string statusLabel = inv.Status switch
                            {
                                InvoiceStatus.Paid => "مدفوعة",
                                InvoiceStatus.Unpaid => "غير مدفوعة",
                                InvoiceStatus.PartiallyPaid => "مدفوعة جزئياً",
                                _ => inv.Status.ToString()
                            };
                            string statusClass = inv.Status switch
                            {
                                InvoiceStatus.Paid => "status-paid",
                                InvoiceStatus.Unpaid => "status-unpaid",
                                InvoiceStatus.PartiallyPaid => "status-partial",
                                _ => ""
                            };
                            string statusIcon = inv.Status switch
                            {
                                InvoiceStatus.Paid => "fas fa-check-circle",
                                InvoiceStatus.Unpaid => "fas fa-times-circle",
                                InvoiceStatus.PartiallyPaid => "fas fa-adjust",
                                _ => ""
                            };
                            bool overdue = inv.Status != InvoiceStatus.Paid &&
                            inv.DueDate.HasValue &&
                            inv.DueDate.Value < DateTime.Today;

                            <tr>
                                <td style="font-weight:700; color:#aaa; font-size:0.8rem">
                                    #@inv.MaterialInvoiceID
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="mat-name">@(inv.Material?.MaterialName ?? "—")</div>
                                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(inv.Material?.Unit))
                                    {
                                        <div class="sup-name"><span data-lang="unit_colon">الوحدة:</span> @inv.Material.Unit</div>
                                    }
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="mat-name" style="font-size:0.88rem">
                                        @(inv.Supplier?.SupplierName ?? "—")
                                    </div>
                                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(inv.Supplier?.Phone))
                                    {
                                        <div class="sup-name">
                                            <i class="fas fa-phone-alt"></i> @inv.Supplier.Phone
                                        </div>
                                    }
                                </td>
                                <td class="mi-amount">@inv.Quantity.ToString("N2")</td>
                                <td class="mi-amount">@inv.UnitPrice.ToString("N2")</td>
                                <td class="mi-amount">@inv.TotalAmount.ToString("N2")</td>
                                <td style="color:#e65100; font-weight:600">
                                    @((inv.TaxPercent ?? 0).ToString("N1"))%
                                </td>
                                <td style="color:#2e7d32; font-weight:600">
                                    @((inv.DiscountPercent ?? 0).ToString("N1"))%
                                </td>
                                <td class="mi-amount final">
                                    @inv.FinalAmount.ToString("N2")
                                    <small style="font-size:.7em; font-weight:500">ج.م</small>
                                </td>
                                <td style="white-space:nowrap">
                                    @inv.InvoiceDate.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")
                                </td>
                                <td style="white-space:nowrap">
                                    @if (inv.DueDate.HasValue)
                                    {
                                        if (overdue)
                                        {
                                            <span class="overdue-tag" data-lang="overdue">متأخر!</span>
                                        }
                                        @inv.DueDate.Value.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <span style="color:#bbb">—</span>
                                    }

                                   onmouseover="this.style.background='#f8f9fa'"
                                   onmouseout="this.style.background='#fff'">
                                <input type="checkbox"
                                       name="selectedEmployees"
                                       value="@emp.EmployeeId"
                                       data-name="@emp.FirstName @emp.LastName"
                                       onchange="updateEmpLabel()"
                                       style="width:16px; height:16px; cursor:pointer; flex-shrink:0" />
                                <span style="font-size:0.9rem">
                                    @emp.FirstName @emp.LastName
                                    @if (isPM)

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        function toggleEmpDropdown() {
            const panel   = document.getElementById('empDropdownPanel');
            const chevron = document.getElementById('empChevron');
            const isOpen  = panel.style.display === 'block';
            panel.style.display        = isOpen ? 'none' : 'block';
            chevron.style.transform    = isOpen ? 'rotate(0deg)' : 'rotate(180deg)';
        }

        function updateEmpLabel() {
            const checked = document.querySelectorAll(
                'input[name="selectedEmployees"]:checked');
            const label = document.getElementById('empDropdownLabel');
            if (checked.length === 0) {
                var lang = localStorage.getItem('lang') || 'ar';
                label.textContent = (TRANSLATIONS[lang] && TRANSLATIONS[lang]['select_engineers_placeholder']) || '-- اختر المهندسين --';
            } else {
                label.textContent = Array.from(checked)
                    .map(cb => cb.getAttribute('data-name'))
                    .join('، ');
            }
        }

        // Close when clicking outside
        document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
            const btn   = document.getElementById('empDropdownBtn');
            const panel = document.getElementById('empDropdownPanel');
            if (btn && panel &&
                !btn.contains(e.target) &&
                !panel.contains(e.target)) {
                panel.style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('empChevron')
                         .style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
            }
        });
    </script>
}=== File: ./BonyanForEngineeringConsultingFirms/Views/Project/Delete.cshtml ===

﻿@model Bonyan.DAL.Models.Project
@using Bonyan.DAL.Enums
@using Bonyan.DAL.Models
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "تفاصيل المشروع";
    var role = Context.Session.GetString("Role");

    string statusAr = Model.Status switch
    {
        ProjectStatus.Planning => "تخطيط",
        ProjectStatus.InProgress => "جاري التنفيذ",
        ProjectStatus.Completed => "مكتمل",
        ProjectStatus.OnHold => "موقوف",
        ProjectStatus.Cancelled => "ملغي",
        _ => Model.Status.ToString()
    };

    string badgeClass = Model.Status switch
    {
        ProjectStatus.Planning => "badge-planning",
        ProjectStatus.InProgress => "badge-inprogress",
        ProjectStatus.Completed => "badge-completed",
        ProjectStatus.OnHold => "badge-onhold",
        ProjectStatus.Cancelled => "badge-cancelled",
        _ => "badge-planning"
    };

    // Pull invoices from ViewBag (loaded by controller)
    var projectInvoices = ViewBag.ProjectInvoices as List<Invoice>
                          ?? new List<Invoice>();
}

            <div class="section-header">
                <div class="details-section-title" style="margin-bottom:0" data-lang="tasks">مهام المشروع</div>
                @if (role == "ProjectManager")
                {
                    <a asp-controller="Task" asp-action="Create"
                       asp-route-projectId="@Model.ProjectId"
                       class="btn-bonyan-secondary btn-sm">
                        <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> <span data-lang="add_task">إضافة مهمة</span>
                    </a>
                }
            </div>
            @if (Model.Tasks != null && Model.Tasks.Any())
            {
                <div class="details-table-wrap">
                <table class="details-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th><span data-lang="task_name">المهمة</span></th>
                            <th><span data-lang="status">الحالة</span></th>
                            <th><span data-lang="due_date">الموعد النهائي</span></th>
                            @if (role == "ProjectManager")
                            {
                                <th><span data-lang="actions">إجراءات</span></th>
                            }
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        @foreach (var t in Model.Tasks)
                        {
                            string ts = t.Status switch
                            {
                                TasksStatus.Pending => "معلق",
                                TasksStatus.InProgress => "جاري",
                                TasksStatus.UnderReview => "قيد المراجعة",
                                TasksStatus.Completed => "مكتمل",
                                TasksStatus.Cancelled => "ملغي",
                                _ => t.Status.ToString()
                            };
                            string tsEn = t.Status switch
                            {
                                TasksStatus.Pending => "Pending",
                                TasksStatus.InProgress => "In Progress",
                                TasksStatus.UnderReview => "Under Review",
                                TasksStatus.Completed => "Completed",
                                TasksStatus.Cancelled => "Cancelled",
                                _ => t.Status.ToString()
                            };
                            string tsBadge = t.Status switch
                            {
                                TasksStatus.Pending => "task-badge-pending",
                                TasksStatus.InProgress => "task-badge-inprogress",
                                TasksStatus.UnderReview => "task-badge-review",
                                TasksStatus.Completed => "task-badge-completed",
                                TasksStatus.Cancelled => "task-badge-cancelled",
                                _ => ""
                            };
                            <tr>
                                <td>
                                    <a asp-controller="Task" asp-action="Details"
                                       asp-route-id="@t.TaskId"
                                       class="task-link">
                                        @t.Task_Name
                                    </a>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <span class="task-badge @tsBadge"
                                          data-en="@tsEn" data-ar="@ts">@ts</span>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    @(t.DueDate.HasValue? t.DueDate.Value.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd") : "—")
                                </td>
                                @if (role == "ProjectManager")
                                {
                                    <td>
                                        <a asp-controller="Task" asp-action="Edit"
                                           asp-route-id="@t.TaskId"
                                           class="details-action edit" title="Edit">
                                            <i class="fas fa-edit"></i>
                                        </a>
                                        <a asp-controller="Task" asp-action="Delete"
                                           asp-route-id="@t.TaskId" class="details-action delete" title="Delete">
                                            <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                                        </a>
                                    </td>
                                }
                            </tr>
                        }
                    </tbody>
                </table>
                </div>
            }
            else
            {
                <div class="details-table-empty">
                    <i class="fas fa-tasks"></i>
                    <p data-lang="no_tasks">لا توجد مهام لهذا المشروع</p>
                </div>
            }
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── DOCUMENTS TAB ────────────────────────── -->
    <div id="tab-docs" class="tab-panel" style="display:none">
        <div class="details-card">
            <div class="section-header">
                <div class="details-section-title" style="margin-bottom:0" data-lang="documents">مستندات المشروع</div>

                        <th><span data-lang="visit_date">تاريخ الزيارة</span></th>
                        <th><span data-lang="performed_by">أُجريت بواسطة</span></th>

                        <th><span data-lang="safety_status">حالة السلامة</span></th>
                        <th><span data-lang="report_summary">التقرير</span></th>

                        @if (role == "Admin")
                        {
                            <th><span data-lang="delete">حذف</span></th>
                        }
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    @foreach (var sv in Model.SiteVisits.OrderByDescending(x => x.VisitDate))
                    {
                        string safetyAr = sv.SafetyStatus switch
                        {
                            SafetyStatus.Safe => "آمن",
                            SafetyStatus.NeedAttention => "يحتاج انتباه",
                            SafetyStatus.Critical => "حرج",
                            _ => sv.SafetyStatus.ToString()
                        };
                        string safetyEn = sv.SafetyStatus switch
                        {
                            SafetyStatus.Safe => "Safe",
                            SafetyStatus.NeedAttention => "Needs Attention",
                            SafetyStatus.Critical => "Critical",
                            _ => sv.SafetyStatus.ToString()
                        };
                        string safetyColor = sv.SafetyStatus switch
                        {
                            SafetyStatus.Safe => "#146c43",
                            SafetyStatus.NeedAttention => "#7c4a00",
                            SafetyStatus.Critical => "#842029",
                            _ => "#666"
                        };
                        string safetyBg = sv.SafetyStatus switch
                        {
                            SafetyStatus.Safe => "#d1e7dd",
                            SafetyStatus.NeedAttention => "#fff3cd",
                            SafetyStatus.Critical => "#f8d7da",
                            _ => "#eee"
                        };
                        bool empIsPM = sv.Employee?.UserAccount?.Role == UserRole.ProjectManager;
                        string empRoleAr = empIsPM ? "مدير مشروع" : "مهندس";
                        string empRoleEn = empIsPM ? "Project Manager" : "Engineer";

                        <tr>
                            <td>@sv.VisitDate.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm")</td>
                            <td><strong>@(sv.Employee != null ? sv.Employee.FirstName + " " + sv.Employee.LastName : "—")</strong></td>
                            <td>
                                <span class="role-badge"
                                      data-en="@empRoleEn" data-ar="@empRoleAr">
                                    @empRoleAr
                                </span>
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                <span class="safety-badge" style="background:@safetyBg; color:@safetyColor"
                                      data-en="@safetyEn" data-ar="@safetyAr">
                                    @safetyAr
                                </span>
                            </td>
                            <td class="report-cell" title="@sv.Report">
                                @(sv.Report?.Length > 60 ? sv.Report.Substring(0, 60) + "..." : sv.Report ?? "—")
                            </td>
                            <td>
                                @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(sv.VisitPhotos))
                                {
                                    <a href="@sv.VisitPhotos" target="_blank">
                                        <img src="@sv.VisitPhotos" alt="صورة الزيارة"
                                             class="visit-thumb"
                                             onerror="this.style.display='none'" />
                                    </a>
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    <span class="no-data-text" data-lang="no_data">لا توجد</span>
                                }
                            </td>
                            @if (role == "Admin")
                            {
                                <td>
                                    <a asp-controller="SiteVisit" asp-action="Delete"
                                       asp-route-id="@sv.VisitId" class="details-action delete" title="حذف">
                                        <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                                    </a>
                                </td>
                            }
                        </tr>
                    }
                </tbody>

            </div>

            </div>
        }
    </div>
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        function showTab(tabId) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.tab-panel')
                    .forEach(p => p.style.display = 'none');
            document.querySelectorAll('.details-tab-btn')
                    .forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
            document.getElementById(tabId).style.display = 'block';
            document.getElementById('btn-' + tabId).classList.add('active');
        }
    </script>

﻿@* Views/Project/Index.cshtml *@
@model IEnumerable<Bonyan.DAL.Models.Project>
@using Bonyan.DAL.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "المشاريع";
    var role = Context.Session.GetString("Role");
    var today = DateTime.Today;

    var total = Model.Count();
    var inProgress = Model.Count(p => p.Status == ProjectStatus.InProgress);
    var completed = Model.Count(p => p.Status == ProjectStatus.Completed);
    var totalBudget = Model.Sum(p => p.Budget ?? 0);
}

<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/project.css" />

<div class="project-page">

    <!-- ── Header ─────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="page-header">
        <div class="page-header-left">
            <h2><i class="fas fa-diagram-project"></i> <span data-lang="projects">المشاريع</span></h2>
            <p data-lang="projects_sub">إدارة ومتابعة المشاريع الهندسية</p>
        </div>
        @if (role == "Admin")
        {
            <a asp-action="Create" class="btn-proj btn-proj-primary">
                <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> <span data-lang="add_project">إضافة مشروع</span>
            </a>
        }
    </div>

    <!-- ── Alerts ─────────────────────────────────── -->
    @if (TempData["SuccessMessage"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert-success-msg">
            <i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> @TempData["SuccessMessage"]
        </div>
    }
    @if (TempData["ErrorMessage"] != null)
    {
        <div class="alert-error-msg">
            <i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle"></i> @TempData["ErrorMessage"]
        </div>
    }

    <!-- ── KPI Strip ──────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="project-kpi-grid">
        <div class="project-kpi navy">
            <div class="project-kpi-icon"><i class="fas fa-diagram-project"></i></div>
            <div>
                <div class="project-kpi-label" data-lang="proj_kpi_total">إجمالي المشاريع</div>
                <div class="project-kpi-value">@total</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="project-kpi blue">
            <div class="project-kpi-icon"><i class="fas fa-person-digging"></i></div>
            <div>
                <div class="project-kpi-label" data-lang="status_inprogress">قيد التنفيذ</div>
                <div class="project-kpi-value">@inProgress</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="project-kpi green">
            <div class="project-kpi-icon"><i class="fas fa-circle-check"></i></div>
            <div>
                <div class="project-kpi-label" data-lang="status_completed">مكتملة</div>
                <div class="project-kpi-value">@completed</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="project-kpi gold">
            <div class="project-kpi-icon"><i class="fas fa-coins"></i></div>
            <div>
                <div class="project-kpi-label" data-lang="proj_kpi_budget">إجمالي الموازنات</div>
                <div class="project-kpi-value">@totalBudget.ToString("N0") <span data-lang="currency_egp">ج.م</span></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── Filter Bar (client-side) ───────────────── -->
    <div class="filter-bar">
        <select class="filter-select" id="statusFilter">
            <option value="" data-lang="all_statuses">كل الحالات</option>
            <option value="Planning" data-lang="status_planning">تخطيط</option>
            <option value="InProgress" data-lang="status_inprogress">قيد التنفيذ</option>
            <option value="OnHold" data-lang="status_onhold">متوقف</option>
            <option value="Completed" data-lang="status_completed">مكتمل</option>
            <option value="Cancelled" data-lang="status_cancelled">ملغي</option>
        </select>
        <div class="filter-search">
            <i class="fas fa-search"></i>
            <input type="text" id="projSearchInput" data-lang-placeholder="proj_search_placeholder" placeholder="بحث عن مشروع بالاسم أو العميل أو الموقع...">
        </div>
        <button type="button" class="filter-reset" id="resetFiltersBtn">
            <i class="fas fa-rotate-left"></i> <span data-lang="reset_filters">إعادة تعيين</span>
        </button>
        <span class="results-count"><strong id="visibleCount">@total</strong> <span data-lang="proj_count_label">مشروع</span></span>
    </div>

    <!-- ── Projects Grid ──────────────────────────── -->
    @if (Model.Any())
    {
        <div class="projects-grid" id="projectsGrid">
            @foreach (var proj in Model)
            {
                var statusClass = proj.Status switch
                {
                    ProjectStatus.Planning => "badge-planning",
                    ProjectStatus.InProgress => "badge-inprogress",
                    ProjectStatus.OnHold => "badge-onhold",
                    ProjectStatus.Completed => "badge-completed",
                    ProjectStatus.Cancelled => "badge-cancelled",
                    _ => "badge-planning"
                };
                var statusIcon = proj.Status switch
                {
                    ProjectStatus.Planning => "fa-pen-ruler",
                    ProjectStatus.InProgress => "fa-person-digging",
                    ProjectStatus.OnHold => "fa-pause",
                    ProjectStatus.Completed => "fa-circle-check",
                    ProjectStatus.Cancelled => "fa-circle-xmark",
                    _ => "fa-pen-ruler"
                };
                var statusLabelAr = proj.Status switch
                {
                    ProjectStatus.Planning => "تخطيط",
                    ProjectStatus.InProgress => "قيد التنفيذ",
                    ProjectStatus.OnHold => "متوقف",
                    ProjectStatus.Completed => "مكتمل",
                    ProjectStatus.Cancelled => "ملغي",
                    _ => proj.Status.ToString()
                };
                var statusLabelEn = proj.Status switch
                {
                    ProjectStatus.Planning => "Planning",
                    ProjectStatus.InProgress => "In Progress",
                    ProjectStatus.OnHold => "On Hold",
                    ProjectStatus.Completed => "Completed",
                    ProjectStatus.Cancelled => "Cancelled",
                    _ => proj.Status.ToString()
                };

                // ── Progress calculation based on Start/End dates ──
                int progressPercent = 0;
                bool isOverdue = false;
                if (proj.StartDate.HasValue && proj.EndDate.HasValue && proj.EndDate > proj.StartDate)
                {
                    var totalDays = (proj.EndDate.Value - proj.StartDate.Value).TotalDays;
                    var elapsedDays = (today - proj.StartDate.Value).TotalDays;
                    progressPercent = (int)Math.Round((elapsedDays / totalDays) * 100);
                    progressPercent = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(100, progressPercent));
                    isOverdue = today > proj.EndDate.Value && proj.Status != ProjectStatus.Completed;
                }

                var progressClass = proj.Status == ProjectStatus.Completed ? "is-completed"
                : isOverdue ? "is-overdue" : "";

                var teamCount = proj.EmployeeProjects?.Count ?? 0;

                <div class="project-card"
                     data-name="@proj.ProjectName?.ToLower()"
                     data-client="@proj.Client_Name?.ToLower()"
                     data-location="@proj.Location?.ToLower()"
                     data-status="@proj.Status">
                    <div class="project-card-top">
                        <div class="project-card-header">
                            <div class="project-icon"><i class="fas fa-diagram-project"></i></div>
                            <span class="badge-status @statusClass" data-ar="@statusLabelAr" data-en="@statusLabelEn">
                                <i class="fas @statusIcon"></i> @statusLabelAr
                            </span>
                        </div>

                        <div class="project-card-title-row">
                            <p class="project-card-title" title="@proj.ProjectName">@proj.ProjectName</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="project-card-client">
                            <i class="fas fa-user-tie"></i> @(proj.Client_Name ?? "—")
                        </div>

                        @if (proj.StartDate.HasValue && proj.EndDate.HasValue)
                        {
                            <div class="project-progress-wrap">
                                <div class="project-progress-labels">
                                    <span data-lang="proj_progress_label">التقدم الزمني</span>
                                    <strong class="progress-value"
                                            data-ar-overdue="متأخر" data-en-overdue="Overdue"
                                            data-percent="@progressPercent"
                                            data-overdue="@isOverdue.ToString().ToLower()">
                                        @(isOverdue ? "متأخر" : $"{progressPercent}%")
                                    </strong>
                                </div>
                                <div class="project-progress-bar">
                                    <div class="project-progress-fill @progressClass" style="width:@progressPercent%"></div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        }

                        <div class="project-meta">
                            <div class="project-meta-item">
                                <label><i class="fas fa-calendar-day"></i> <span data-lang="start_date">تاريخ البدء</span></label>
                                <span>@(proj.StartDate?.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd") ?? "—")</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="project-meta-item">
                                <label><i class="fas fa-calendar-check"></i> <span data-lang="end_date">تاريخ الانتهاء</span></label>
                                <span>@(proj.EndDate?.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd") ?? "—")</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="project-meta-item">
                                <label><i class="fas fa-location-dot"></i> <span data-lang="location">الموقع</span></label>
                                <span>@(proj.Location ?? "—")</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="project-meta-item">
                                <label><i class="fas fa-coins"></i> <span data-lang="budget">الموازنة</span></label>
                                <span class="project-budget-value">@(proj.Budget.HasValue ? proj.Budget.Value.ToString("N0") : "—")</span>
                                @if (proj.Budget.HasValue)
                                {
                                    <span data-lang="currency_egp">ج.م</span>
                                }
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="project-card-footer">
                        <div class="project-team">
                            <i class="fas fa-users"></i> <span class="team-count">@teamCount</span> <span data-lang="members">عضو</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="project-actions">
                            <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@proj.ProjectId"
                               class="btn-action view"
                               data-tip-ar="عرض التفاصيل" data-tip-en="View Details" data-tip="عرض التفاصيل">
                                <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                            </a>
                            @if (role == "Admin")
                            {
                                <a asp-action="Edit" asp-route-id="@proj.ProjectId"
                                   class="btn-action edit"
                                   data-tip-ar="تعديل" data-tip-en="Edit" data-tip="تعديل">
                                    <i class="fas fa-pen"></i>
                                </a>
                                <a asp-action="Delete" asp-route-id="@proj.ProjectId"
                                   class="btn-action delete"
                                   data-tip-ar="حذف" data-tip-en="Delete" data-tip="حذف">
                                    <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                                </a>
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            }
        </div>
        <div class="empty-state" id="noResultsState" style="display:none">
            <i class="fas fa-folder-open"></i>
            <h6 data-lang="no_match_results">لا توجد نتائج مطابقة</h6>
            <p data-lang="try_adjust_filters">جرّب تعديل كلمات البحث أو الفلاتر المستخدمة</p>
        </div>
    }
    else
    {
        <div class="empty-state">
            <i class="fas fa-diagram-project"></i>
            <h6 data-lang="no_projects">لا توجد مشاريع مسجلة</h6>
            <p data-lang="add_first_project">ابدأ بإضافة أول مشروع هندسي لشركتك</p>
        </div>
    }
</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        (function () {
            var searchInput = document.getElementById('projSearchInput');
            var statusFilter = document.getElementById('statusFilter');
            var resetBtn = document.getElementById('resetFiltersBtn');
            var grid = document.getElementById('projectsGrid');
            var visibleCountEl = document.getElementById('visibleCount');
            var noResultsState = document.getElementById('noResultsState');

            if (!grid) return;

            var cards = Array.prototype.slice.call(grid.querySelectorAll('.project-card'));

            function applyFilters() {
                var term = (searchInput.value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
                var status = statusFilter.value;
                var visible = 0;

                cards.forEach(function (card) {
                    var matchesTerm = !term ||
                        (card.dataset.name || '').indexOf(term) !== -1 ||
                        (card.dataset.client || '').indexOf(term) !== -1 ||
                        (card.dataset.location || '').indexOf(term) !== -1;

                    var matchesStatus = !status || card.dataset.status === status;

                    var show = matchesTerm && matchesStatus;
                    card.style.display = show ? '' : 'none';
                    if (show) visible++;
                });

                visibleCountEl.textContent = visible;
                if (noResultsState) {
                    noResultsState.style.display = visible === 0 ? 'block' : 'none';
                }
            }

            searchInput.addEventListener('input', applyFilters);
            statusFilter.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);
            resetBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
                searchInput.value = '';
                statusFilter.value = '';
                applyFilters();
            });

            // Update tooltips + overdue text on language change
            document.addEventListener('languageChanged', function (e) {
                var lang = e.detail.lang;
                document.querySelectorAll('[data-tip-ar]').forEach(function (el) {
                    el.setAttribute('data-tip', lang === 'ar' ? el.dataset.tipAr : el.dataset.tipEn);
                });
                document.querySelectorAll('.progress-value[data-overdue="true"]').forEach(function (el) {
                    el.textContent = lang === 'ar' ? el.dataset.arOverdue : el.dataset.enOverdue;
                });
            });
        })();
    </script>
}

﻿@model ErrorViewModel
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "Error";
}

<h1 class="text-danger">Error.</h1>
<h2 class="text-danger">An error occurred while processing your request.</h2>

@if (Model.ShowRequestId)
{
    <p>
        <strong>Request ID:</strong> <code>@Model.RequestId</code>
    </p>
}

<h3>Development Mode</h3>
<p>
    Swapping to <strong>Development</strong> environment will display more detailed information about the error that occurred.
</p>
<p>
    <strong>The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications.</strong>
    It can result in displaying sensitive information from exceptions to end users.
    For local debugging, enable the <strong>Development</strong> environment by setting the <strong>ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT</strong> environment variable to <strong>Development</strong>
    and restarting the app.
</p>

    <script>
        // ── Restore dark/light preference BEFORE first paint of content ──
        // Runs as the very first thing inside <body> (document.body already
        // exists at this point even though later elements haven't been
        // parsed yet), so there is no flash of the wrong theme.
        (function () {
            const saved = localStorage.getItem('bonyan-dark');
            const prefersDark = window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches;
            const on = saved === '1' || (saved === null && prefersDark);
            if (on) document.body.classList.add('dark-mode');
        })();
    </script>

    <script>
        // ── Sidebar toggle ─────────────────────────
        // ── Sidebar toggle ─────────────────────────
        // ── Sidebar toggle ─────────────────────────
         function toggleSidebar() {
             document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.toggle('collapsed');
             // Force a reflow so the CSS [dir] + .collapsed sibling selector updates instantly
             document.getElementById('mainContent') && void document.getElementById('mainContent').offsetHeight;
         }
        // ── Dark Mode ──────────────────────────────
        const darkBtn  = document.getElementById('darkModeBtn');
        const darkIcon = document.getElementById('darkModeIcon');

        function applyDarkMode(on) {
            document.body.classList.toggle('dark-mode', on);
            darkIcon.className = on ? 'fas fa-sun' : 'fas fa-moon';
            localStorage.setItem('bonyan-dark', on ? '1' : '0');
        }

        function toggleDarkMode() {
            applyDarkMode(!document.body.classList.contains('dark-mode'));
        }

        // Theme class was already applied pre-paint (see the inline script
        // right after <body>); just sync the toggle icon to match it.
        darkIcon.className = document.body.classList.contains('dark-mode') ? 'fas fa-sun' : 'fas fa-moon';
    </script>

                        <span data-lang="safety_safe">آمن</span>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>
                        <i class="fas fa-camera" style="color:var(--secondary);margin-left:4px"></i>

                            <p data-lang="drag_drop_photo_site">اسحب الصورة هنا أو انقر للاختيار</p>
                            <span data-lang="allowed_formats_img">JPG, PNG, GIF, WEBP</span>
                        </div>
                        <img id="sitePhotoPreview" style="display:none; max-height:120px; border-radius:8px; margin-top:6px" alt="معاينة" />
                        <input type="file" name="visitPhoto" id="photoInput"
                               accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png,.gif,.webp"
                               onchange="previewSitePhoto(this)" />
                    </div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        var safetyMap = {
            0: { cls: 'badge-safe',     icon: 'fa-check-circle', label: 'آمن' },
            1: { cls: 'badge-attention', icon: 'fa-exclamation-triangle', label: 'يحتاج انتباه' },
            2: { cls: 'badge-critical',  icon: 'fa-times-circle', label: 'حرج' }
        };
        function updateSafetyBadge(sel) {
            var preview = document.getElementById('safetyPreview');
            var val = sel.value;
            if (val === '') { preview.style.display = 'none'; return; }
            var m = safetyMap[val];
            if (!m) return;
            preview.className = m.cls;
            preview.style.display = 'inline-flex';
            preview.style.alignItems = 'center';
            preview.style.gap = '6px';
            preview.querySelector('i').className = 'fas ' + m.icon;
            preview.querySelector('span').textContent = m.label;
        }
        function previewSitePhoto(input) {
            if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
                var reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = function (e) {
                    var img = document.getElementById('sitePhotoPreview');
                    img.src = e.target.result;
                    img.style.display = 'block';
                    document.getElementById('photoDropContent').style.display = 'none';
                    document.getElementById('photoDropZone').style.borderColor = 'var(--secondary)';
                };
                reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
            }
        }
        var zone = document.getElementById('photoDropZone');
        zone.addEventListener('dragover', function (e) { e.preventDefault(); zone.classList.add('dragover'); });
        zone.addEventListener('dragleave', function () { zone.classList.remove('dragover'); });
        zone.addEventListener('drop', function (e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            zone.classList.remove('dragover');
            var dt = e.dataTransfer;
            if (dt.files.length) {
                document.getElementById('photoInput').files = dt.files;
                previewSitePhoto(document.getElementById('photoInput'));
            }
        });
    </script>
}
=== File: ./BonyanForEngineeringConsultingFirms/Views/SiteVisit/Delete.cshtml ===
@model Bonyan.DAL.Models.SiteVisit
@using Bonyan.DAL.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "حذف زيارة موقع";
    string safetyAr = Model.SafetyStatus switch
    {
        SafetyStatus.Safe => "آمن",
        SafetyStatus.NeedAttention => "يحتاج انتباه",
        SafetyStatus.Critical => "حرج",
        _ => Model.SafetyStatus.ToString()
    };
    string safetyEn = Model.SafetyStatus switch
    {
        SafetyStatus.Safe => "Safe",
        SafetyStatus.NeedAttention => "Needs Attention",
        SafetyStatus.Critical => "Critical",
        _ => Model.SafetyStatus.ToString()
    };
}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/employee.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/employee-dark.css" />

<div class="delete-card">
    <div class="delete-card-header">
        <i class="fas fa-trash-alt"></i>
        <h4 data-lang="delete_sitevisit">حذف زيارة موقع</h4>
    </div>
    <div class="delete-card-body">
        <div class="delete-icon">
            <i class="fas fa-hard-hat"></i>
        </div>
        <h5 data-lang="delete_confirm">هل أنت متأكد من الحذف؟</h5>
        <p data-lang="delete_warning">لا يمكن التراجع عن هذا الإجراء بعد تأكيده</p>

        <div class="delete-info-box">
            <p>
                <strong data-lang="visit_report">التقرير: </strong>
                @(Model.Report?.Length > 80 ? Model.Report[..80] + "..." : Model.Report ?? "—")
            </p>
            <p>
                <strong data-lang="safety_status">حالة السلامة: </strong>
                <span data-ar="@safetyAr" data-en="@safetyEn">@safetyAr</span>
            </p>
        </div>

        <form asp-action="Delete" method="post">
            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
            <input type="hidden" name="id" value="@Model.VisitId" />
            <a asp-controller="Project" asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@Model.ProjId" class="btn-bonyan-primary">
                <i class="fas fa-times"></i> <span data-lang="cancel">إلغاء</span>
            </a>
            <button type="submit" class="btn-bonyan-danger">
                <i class="fas fa-trash"></i> <span data-lang="delete_confirm_btn">نعم، احذف</span>
            </button>
        </form>
    </div>
</div>

﻿@model Bonyan.DAL.Models.SiteVisit
@using Bonyan.DAL.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "تفاصيل زيارة الموقع";
    var role = Context.Session.GetString("Role");
    string safetyLabel = Model.SafetyStatus switch
    {
        SafetyStatus.Safe => "آمن",
        SafetyStatus.NeedAttention => "يحتاج انتباه",
        SafetyStatus.Critical => "حرج",
        _ => Model.SafetyStatus.ToString()
    };
    string safetyClass = Model.SafetyStatus switch
    {
        SafetyStatus.Safe => "badge-safe",
        SafetyStatus.NeedAttention => "badge-attention",
        SafetyStatus.Critical => "badge-critical",
        _ => ""
    };
    string safetyEn = Model.SafetyStatus.ToString();
}

<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/employee-dark.css" />

        function openLightbox(src) {
            document.getElementById('lightbox-img').src = src;
            document.getElementById('lightbox-overlay').classList.add('active');
        }
        function closeLightbox() {
            document.getElementById('lightbox-overlay').classList.remove('active');
        }
        document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Escape') closeLightbox(); });
    </script>

@section Scripts {
    @{
        await Html.RenderPartialAsync("_ValidationScriptsPartial");
    }
    <script>
        function previewImage(input) {
            if (input.files && input.files[0]) {
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = e => {
                    const img = document.getElementById('imgPreview');
                    img.src = e.target.result;
                    img.style.display = 'block';
                    document.getElementById('dropContent').style.display = 'none';
                    document.getElementById('dropZone').style.borderColor = 'var(--secondary)';
                };
                reader.readAsDataURL(input.files[0]);
            }
        }
        const zone = document.getElementById('dropZone');
        zone.addEventListener('dragover',  e => { e.preventDefault(); zone.classList.add('dragover'); });
        zone.addEventListener('dragleave', () => zone.classList.remove('dragover'));
        zone.addEventListener('drop', e => {
            e.preventDefault(); zone.classList.remove('dragover');
            if (e.dataTransfer.files.length) {
                document.getElementById('fileInput').files = e.dataTransfer.files;
                previewImage(document.getElementById('fileInput'));
            }
        });
    </script>
}

﻿@model IEnumerable<Bonyan.DAL.Models.SiteVisit>
@using Bonyan.DAL.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "زيارات الموقع";
    var role = Context.Session.GetString("Role");
    var projects = ViewBag.Projects as List<Bonyan.DAL.Models.Project> ?? new();
    int? selectedProjectId = ViewBag.SelectedProjectId as int?;

    var visitsList = Model?.ToList() ?? new List<Bonyan.DAL.Models.SiteVisit>();
    int projectsCovered = visitsList.Select(v => v.ProjId).Distinct().Count();
    int safeCount = visitsList.Count(v => v.SafetyStatus == SafetyStatus.Safe);
    int attentionCount = visitsList.Count(v => v.SafetyStatus == SafetyStatus.NeedAttention);
}

<link rel="stylesheet" href="~/css/employee.css" />

<div class="emp-page">

        {

                <a asp-action="Create" asp-route-projectId="@selectedProjectId" class="btn-emp btn-emp-primary">
                    <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> <span data-lang="sv_add_btn">إضافة زيارة موقع</span>

                    <tbody>
                        @foreach (var sv in visitsList)
                        {
                            string safetyLabel = sv.SafetyStatus switch
                            {
                                SafetyStatus.Safe => "آمن",
                                SafetyStatus.NeedAttention => "يحتاج انتباه",
                                SafetyStatus.Critical => "حرج",
                                _ => sv.SafetyStatus.ToString()
                            };
                            string safetyEn = sv.SafetyStatus switch
                            {
                                SafetyStatus.Safe => "Safe",
                                SafetyStatus.NeedAttention => "Needs Attention",
                                SafetyStatus.Critical => "Critical",
                                _ => sv.SafetyStatus.ToString()
                            };
