                            {
                                SafetyStatus.Safe => "badge-male",
                                SafetyStatus.NeedAttention => "badge-female",
                                SafetyStatus.Critical => "spec-civil",
                                _ => ""
                            };
                            bool empIsPM = sv.Employee?.UserAccount?.Role == UserRole.ProjectManager;
                            string empRoleLabel = empIsPM ? "مدير مشروع" : "مهندس";
                            string empRoleEn = empIsPM ? "Project Manager" : "Engineer";

                            <tr data-project="@(sv.Project?.ProjectName ?? "")"
                                data-employee="@(sv.Employee != null ? sv.Employee.FirstName + " " + sv.Employee.LastName : "")"
                                data-report="@(sv.Report ?? "")">
                                <td><strong>@(sv.Project?.ProjectName ?? "—")</strong></td>
                                <td>
                                    <div class="emp-contact-cell" style="background:transparent; padding:0">
                                        <span style="font-weight:600; color:var(--primary); margin:0">
                                            <i class="fas fa-user"></i>
                                            @(sv.Employee != null ? sv.Employee.FirstName + " " + sv.Employee.LastName : "—")
                                        </span>
                                    </div>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <span class="role-pill @(empIsPM ? "pm" : "")"
                                          data-ar="@empRoleLabel" data-en="@empRoleEn">
                                        <i class="fas @(empIsPM ? "fa-user-tie" : "fa-hard-hat")"></i> @empRoleLabel
                                    </span>
                                </td>
                                <td>@sv.VisitDate.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm")</td>
                                <td>
                                    <span class="badge-spec @safetyClass"
                                          data-ar="@safetyLabel" data-en="@safetyEn">
                                        <i class="fas @(sv.SafetyStatus == SafetyStatus.Safe ? "fa-check-circle" : sv.SafetyStatus == SafetyStatus.Critical ? "fa-bolt" : "fa-exclamation")"></i>
                                        @safetyLabel
                                    </span>
                                </td>
                                <td style="max-width:200px; white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis"
                                    title="@sv.Report">
                                    @(sv.Report?.Length > 50 ? sv.Report.Substring(0, 50) + "..." : sv.Report ?? "—")
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(sv.VisitPhotos))
                                    {
                                        <a href="@sv.VisitPhotos" target="_blank">
                                            <img src="@sv.VisitPhotos" alt="Site photo"
                                                 style="width:40px; height:40px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid #eee"
                                                 onerror="this.style.display='none'" />
                                        </a>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <span style="color:#aaa; font-size:0.8rem">—</span>
                                    }
                                </td>

                                               class="btn-action delete"

                                    </td>

            </div>
            <div class="empty-state" id="noResultsState" style="display:none">
                <i class="fas fa-hard-hat"></i>
                <h6 data-lang="no_match_results">لا توجد نتائج مطابقة</h6>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        (function () {
            var searchInput = document.getElementById('svSearchInput');
            var resetBtn = document.getElementById('resetFiltersBtn');
            var table = document.getElementById('svTable');
            var visibleCountEl = document.getElementById('visibleCount');
            var noResultsState = document.getElementById('noResultsState');

            if (!table) return;

            var rows = Array.prototype.slice.call(table.querySelectorAll('tbody tr'));

            function applyFilters() {
                var term = (searchInput.value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
                var visible = 0;

                rows.forEach(function (row) {
                    var matchesTerm = !term ||
                        (row.dataset.project || '').toLowerCase().indexOf(term) !== -1 ||
                        (row.dataset.employee || '').toLowerCase().indexOf(term) !== -1 ||
                        (row.dataset.report || '').toLowerCase().indexOf(term) !== -1;

                    var show = matchesTerm;
                    row.style.display = show ? '' : 'none';
                    if (show) visible++;
                });

                visibleCountEl.textContent = visible;
                if (noResultsState) {
                    noResultsState.style.display = visible === 0 ? 'block' : 'none';
                }
            }

            searchInput.addEventListener('input', applyFilters);
            resetBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
                searchInput.value = '';
                applyFilters();
            });

            // Update tooltips on language change
            document.addEventListener('languageChanged', function (e) {
                var lang = e.detail.lang;
                document.querySelectorAll('[data-tip-ar]').forEach(function (el) {
                    el.setAttribute('data-tip', lang === 'ar' ? el.dataset.tipAr : el.dataset.tipEn);
                });
            });
        })();

        // ── Bilingual delete confirmation ─────────────────────────
        function svConfirmDelete() {
            var lang = localStorage.getItem('lang') || 'ar';
            var msg = lang === 'ar'
                ? 'هل أنت متأكد من حذف هذه الزيارة؟'
                : 'Are you sure you want to delete this site visit?';
            return confirm(msg);
        }
    </script>
}

        <form asp-action="Create" method="post" id="supplierForm">
            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()

            @if (!ViewData.ModelState.IsValid)
            {
                <div style="background:#fde8e8; border:1px solid #f5c6cb; border-radius:10px;
                        padding:14px 18px; margin-bottom:18px; color:#842029;">
                    <strong><i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i> يوجد أخطاء في النموذج:</strong>
                    <ul style="margin:8px 0 0 0; padding-right:20px">

                        }

                </div>
            }

            @if (ViewBag.ValidationErrors != null)
            {

                        {

                        }
                    </ul>
                </div>
            }

            <div class="form-section-title" data-lang="supplier_data">بيانات المورد</div>
            <div class="form-grid-2">

                        <span id="dropdownLabel" style="color:#aaa" data-lang="choose_supplied_materials">— اختر المواد التي يورّدها —</span>
                        <i class="fas fa-chevron-down" id="dropdownArrow"
                           style="color:#aaa;transition:transform 0.25s"></i>
                    </button>

                    <div id="materialDropdown"
                         style="display:none;position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 6px);right:0;left:0;
                                background:#fff;border:2px solid #e0e0e0;border-radius:10px;
                                box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.13);z-index:200;
                                max-height:250px;overflow-y:auto">

                        @foreach (var item in new[] {
                                                new { Val="Steel",  Icon="fas fa-hard-hat",  Color="#546e7a", Label="حديد تسليح (Steel)" },
                                                new { Val="Sand",   Icon="fas fa-mountain",  Color="#fb8c00", Label="رمل (Sand)" },
                                                new { Val="Cement", Icon="fas fa-box",       Color="#78909c", Label="أسمنت (Cement)" },
                                                new { Val="Bricks", Icon="fas fa-th-large",  Color="#e53935", Label="طوب (Bricks)" },
                                                new { Val="Others", Icon="fas fa-ellipsis-h",Color="#8e24aa", Label="أخرى (Others)" }
                                                })
                        {
                            <label id="lbl_@item.Val" onclick="onTypeChange('@item.Val')"
                                   style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;padding:13px 18px;
                                                  cursor:pointer;border-bottom:1px solid #f5f5f5;margin:0;
                                                  transition:background 0.15s;user-select:none">
                                <input type="checkbox" name="selectedMaterialTypes" value="@item.Val"
                                       id="chk_@item.Val" class="mat-type-cb"
                                       style="width:18px;height:18px;cursor:pointer;accent-color:@item.Color"
                                       onclick="event.stopPropagation()" onchange="onTypeChange('@item.Val')" />
                                <i class="@item.Icon" style="color:@item.Color;width:18px;text-align:center"></i>
                                <span style="font-size:0.92rem;font-weight:500">@item.Label</span>
                            </label>
                        }
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div id="othersBox" style="display:none;margin-top:10px;max-width:420px">
                    <input type="text" name="othersText" id="othersText" class="form-control"
                           data-lang-placeholder="other_material_placeholder" placeholder="اكتب نوع المادة الأخرى (مثال: رخام، زجاج، خشب...)" />
                </div>

                <div id="selectedChips" style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-top:12px"></div>

<style>
    .form-card { overflow: visible !important; }
    .mat-chip {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
        padding: 5px 14px;
        border-radius: 20px;
        font-size: 0.82rem;
        font-weight: 600;
        color: #fff
    }

    .chip-Steel {
        background: #546e7a
    }

    .chip-Sand {
        background: #fb8c00
    }

    .chip-Cement {
        background: #78909c;
        color: #222
    }

    .chip-Bricks {
        background: #e53935
    }

    .chip-Others {
        background: #8e24aa
    }

    #dropdownToggle:hover {
        border-color: var(--primary)
    }
</style>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        var chipLabels={Steel:'حديد (Steel)',Sand:'رمل (Sand)',Cement:'أسمنت (Cement)',Bricks:'طوب (Bricks)',Others:'أخرى'};

        function toggleDropdown(){
            var d=document.getElementById('materialDropdown');
            var a=document.getElementById('dropdownArrow');
            var open=d.style.display==='block';
            d.style.display=open?'none':'block';
            a.style.transform=open?'rotate(0deg)':'rotate(180deg)';
            document.getElementById('dropdownToggle').style.borderColor=open?'#e0e0e0':'var(--primary)';
        }

        document.addEventListener('click',function(e){
            var btn=document.getElementById('dropdownToggle');
            var dd=document.getElementById('materialDropdown');
            if(btn&&dd&&!btn.contains(e.target)&&!dd.contains(e.target)){
                dd.style.display='none';
                document.getElementById('dropdownArrow').style.transform='rotate(0deg)';
                document.getElementById('dropdownToggle').style.borderColor='#e0e0e0';
            }
        });

        function onTypeChange(type){
            var cb=document.getElementById('chk_'+type);
            var lbl=document.getElementById('lbl_'+type);
            lbl.style.background=cb.checked?'#f0f7ff':'#fff';
            if(type==='Others'){
                document.getElementById('othersBox').style.display=cb.checked?'block':'none';
                if(!cb.checked) document.getElementById('othersText').value='';
            }
            updateChips();
            updateLabel();
        }

        function removeChip(type){
            var cb=document.getElementById('chk_'+type);
            if(cb){ cb.checked=false; }
            if(type==='Others'){
                document.getElementById('othersBox').style.display='none';
                document.getElementById('othersText').value='';
            }
            var lbl=document.getElementById('lbl_'+type);
            if(lbl){ lbl.style.background='#fff'; }
            updateChips();
            updateLabel();
        }

        function updateChips(){
            var c=document.getElementById('selectedChips');
            c.innerHTML='';
            document.querySelectorAll('.mat-type-cb:checked').forEach(function(cb){
                var t=cb.value;
                var text=t==='Others'?'أخرى: '+(document.getElementById('othersText').value||'...')
                                      :chipLabels[t];
                var span=document.createElement('span');
                span.className='mat-chip chip-'+t;
                span.style.cursor='default';
                span.innerHTML='<i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> '+text
                    +' <i class="fas fa-times" style="cursor:pointer;margin-right:4px;font-size:0.75rem;opacity:0.7" onclick="removeChip(\''+t+'\')"></i>';
                c.appendChild(span);
            });
        }

        function updateLabel(){
            var checked=document.querySelectorAll('.mat-type-cb:checked');
            var lbl=document.getElementById('dropdownLabel');
            if(checked.length===0){
                lbl.textContent='— اختر المواد التي يورّدها —';
                lbl.style.color='#aaa';
            }else{
                lbl.textContent=checked.length+' '+(checked.length===1?'مادة':'مواد')+' محددة';
                lbl.style.color='var(--primary)';
            }
        }

        document.getElementById('othersText').addEventListener('input',updateChips);
    </script>
}

﻿@model Bonyan.DAL.Models.Supplier
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "تعديل مورد";
    var materialTypes = new[] { "Steel", "Sand", "Cement", "Bricks", "Others" };
    var materialLabels = new Dictionary<string, string> {
        {"Steel","حديد (Steel)"},{"Sand","رمل (Sand)"},
        {"Cement","أسمنت (Cement)"},{"Bricks","طوب (Bricks)"},{"Others","أخرى (Others)"}
    };
    // Parse existing types
    var existingTypes = (Model.SuppliedMaterialTypes ?? "")
        .Split(',', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries).ToList();
    var checkedTypes = existingTypes.Select(t => t.StartsWith("Others:") ? "Others" : t).ToList();
    var othersValue = existingTypes.FirstOrDefault(t => t.StartsWith("Others:"))?.Substring(7) ?? "";
}

    <div class="form-card-body">
        <form asp-action="Edit" method="post" id="supplierForm">
            @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
            <input type="hidden" asp-for="SupplierID" />

            <div class="form-section-title" data-lang="supplier_data">بيانات المورد</div>
            <div class="form-grid-2">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label><span data-lang="supplier_name_label">اسم المورد</span> <span class="required">*</span></label>

                </div>

                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="email">البريد الإلكتروني</label>
                    <input asp-for="Email" type="email" class="form-control" />
                    <span asp-validation-for="Email" class="text-danger"></span>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label data-lang="phone">الهاتف</label>
                    <input asp-for="Phone" class="form-control" />
                </div>
                <div class="form-group" style="grid-column:1 / -1">
                    <label data-lang="address">العنوان</label>
                    <textarea asp-for="Address" class="form-control" rows="2"></textarea>
                </div>
            </div>

            <hr style="margin:24px 0;" />

            <div class="form-group">
                <label style="font-weight:700; color:var(--primary)">
                    <i class="fas fa-boxes"></i> <span data-lang="materials_supplied_by">المواد التي يورّدها هذا المورد</span>
                </label>

                <div style="position:relative; max-width:400px">
                    <button type="button" id="dropdownToggle" onclick="toggleDropdown()"
                            style="width:100%;background:#fff;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:8px;
                                   padding:10px 14px;text-align:right;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;
                                   display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center">
                        <span id="dropdownLabel" style="color:var(--primary)">
                            @(checkedTypes.Any() ? checkedTypes.Count + " مادة محددة" : "-- اختر المواد المورَّدة --")
                        </span>
                        <i class="fas fa-chevron-down" id="dropdownArrow" style="color:#aaa;transition:transform 0.2s"></i>
                    </button>

                    <div id="materialDropdown"
                         style="display:none;position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 4px);right:0;left:0;
                                background:#fff;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:8px;
                                box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);z-index:100;
                                max-height:250px;overflow-y:auto">
                        @foreach (var type in materialTypes)
                        {
                            bool isChecked2 = checkedTypes.Contains(type);
                            <label id="label_@type"
                                   style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:12px 16px;
                                                  cursor:pointer;border-bottom:1px solid #f0f0f0;margin:0;
                                                  background:@(isChecked2 ? "#e8f5e9" : "#fff");
                                                  transition:background 0.15s;font-size:0.92rem">
                                <input type="checkbox" name="selectedMaterialTypes" value="@type"
                                       id="chk_@type" class="mat-type-cb"
                                       @(isChecked2 ? "checked" : "")
                                       onchange="onTypeChange('@type')"
                                       style="width:17px;height:17px;cursor:pointer;accent-color:var(--primary)" />
                                <span>@materialLabels[type]</span>
                            </label>
                        }
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div id="othersBox" style="display:@(checkedTypes.Contains("Others") ? "block" : "none");margin-top:10px;max-width:400px">
                    <input type="text" name="othersText" id="othersText"
                           class="form-control" value="@othersValue"
                           data-lang-placeholder="other_material_placeholder2" placeholder="اكتب نوع المادة الأخرى..." />
                </div>

                <div id="selectedChips" style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-top:10px"></div>
            </div>

            <div class="form-actions" style="margin-top:24px">
                <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@Model.SupplierID" class="btn-bonyan-primary">
                    <i class="fas fa-times"></i> <span data-lang="cancel">إلغاء</span>
                </a>
                <button type="submit" class="btn-bonyan-secondary">

<style>
    .form-card { overflow: visible !important; }
    .mat-chip {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 6px;
        background: var(--primary);
        color: #fff;
        padding: 4px 12px;
        border-radius: 20px;
        font-size: 0.82rem;
        font-weight: 600;
    }

        .mat-chip.others {
            background: #ab47bc;
        }

        .mat-chip.steel {
            background: #607d8b;
        }

        .mat-chip.sand {
            background: #ffa726;
        }

        .mat-chip.cement {
            background: #90a4ae;
            color: #333;
        }

        .mat-chip.bricks {
            background: #ef5350;
        }
</style>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        const labels = { Steel:'حديد (Steel)', Sand:'رمل (Sand)', Cement:'أسمنت (Cement)', Bricks:'طوب (Bricks)', Others:'أخرى' };
        const chipClass = { Steel:'steel', Sand:'sand', Cement:'cement', Bricks:'bricks', Others:'others' };

        function toggleDropdown() {
            var d = document.getElementById('materialDropdown');
            var a = document.getElementById('dropdownArrow');
            var open = d.style.display === 'block';
            d.style.display = open ? 'none' : 'block';
            a.style.transform = open ? 'rotate(0deg)' : 'rotate(180deg)';
        }
        document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            if (!document.getElementById('dropdownToggle').contains(e.target) &&
                !document.getElementById('materialDropdown').contains(e.target)) {
                document.getElementById('materialDropdown').style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('dropdownArrow').style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
            }
        });
        function isChecked(type) { return document.getElementById('chk_' + type)?.checked; }
        function onTypeChange(type) {
            var cb = document.getElementById('chk_' + type);
            document.getElementById('label_' + type).style.background = cb.checked ? '#e8f5e9' : '#fff';
            if (type === 'Others') {
                document.getElementById('othersBox').style.display = cb.checked ? 'block' : 'none';
                if (!cb.checked) document.getElementById('othersText').value = '';
            }
            updateChips(); updateDropdownLabel();
        }
        function removeChip(type) {
            var cb = document.getElementById('chk_' + type);
            if (cb) { cb.checked = false; }
            if (type === 'Others') {
                document.getElementById('othersBox').style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('othersText').value = '';
            }
            var label = document.getElementById('label_' + type);
            if (label) { label.style.background = '#fff'; }
            updateChips();
            updateDropdownLabel();
        }

        function updateChips() {
            var c = document.getElementById('selectedChips');
            c.innerHTML = '';
            document.querySelectorAll('.mat-type-cb:checked').forEach(function(cb) {
                var type = cb.value;
                var text = type === 'Others' ? 'أخرى: ' + (document.getElementById('othersText').value || '...') : labels[type];
                var chip = document.createElement('span');
                chip.className = 'mat-chip ' + (chipClass[type] || '');
                chip.style.cursor = 'default';
                chip.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-check"></i> ' + text
                    + ' <i class="fas fa-times" style="cursor:pointer;margin-right:4px;font-size:0.75rem;opacity:0.7" onclick="removeChip(\'' + type + '\')"></i>';
                c.appendChild(chip);
            });
        }
        function updateDropdownLabel() {
            var checked = document.querySelectorAll('.mat-type-cb:checked');
            var lbl = document.getElementById('dropdownLabel');
            lbl.textContent = checked.length === 0 ? '-- اختر المواد المورَّدة --' : checked.length + ' مادة محددة';
            lbl.style.color = checked.length === 0 ? '#888' : 'var(--primary)';
        }
        document.getElementById('othersText')?.addEventListener('input', updateChips);
        // Initialize chips on page load
        updateChips();
    </script>
}

﻿@model IEnumerable<Bonyan.DAL.Models.Supplier>
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "الموردون";
    var role = Context.Session.GetString("Role");
    string search = ViewBag.Search ?? "";

    var suppliersList = Model?.ToList() ?? new List<Bonyan.DAL.Models.Supplier>();
    int totalCount = suppliersList.Count;
    int withContact = suppliersList.Count(s => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s.ContactPerson));
    int withPhone = suppliersList.Count(s => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s.Phone));
    int totalMaterialLinks = suppliersList.Sum(s => s.SuppliedMaterials.Count);
}

@section Scripts {
    @{
        await Html.RenderPartialAsync("_ValidationScriptsPartial");
    }
    <script>
        var statusMap = {
            0: { cls: 'badge-pending',  icon: 'fa-circle',     label: 'معلق' },
            1: { cls: 'badge-inprogress',icon: 'fa-spinner',   label: 'جاري' },
            2: { cls: 'badge-review',    icon: 'fa-eye',       label: 'قيد المراجعة' },
            3: { cls: 'badge-completed', icon: 'fa-check-circle',label: 'مكتمل' },
            4: { cls: 'badge-cancelled', icon: 'fa-ban',       label: 'ملغي' }
        };
        function updateStatusPreview(sel) {
            var preview = document.getElementById('statusPreview');
            var val = sel.value;
            if (val === '') { preview.style.display = 'none'; return; }
            var m = statusMap[val];
            if (!m) return;
            preview.className = 'task-status-badge ' + m.cls;
            preview.querySelector('i').className = 'fas ' + m.icon;
            preview.querySelector('span').textContent = m.label;
            preview.style.display = 'inline-flex';
        }
        document.querySelector('.status-select').addEventListener('change', function() {
            updateStatusPreview(this);
        });
        var initial = document.querySelector('.status-select');
        if (initial && initial.value !== '') updateStatusPreview(initial);
    </script>
}

@model Bonyan.DAL.Models.Task
@using Bonyan.DAL.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "حذف مهمة";
    string statusAr = Model.Status switch
    {
        TasksStatus.Pending => "معلق",
        TasksStatus.InProgress => "جاري",
        TasksStatus.UnderReview => "قيد المراجعة",
        TasksStatus.Completed => "مكتمل",
        TasksStatus.Cancelled => "ملغي",
        _ => Model.Status.ToString()
    };
    string statusEn = Model.Status switch
    {
        TasksStatus.Pending => "Pending",
        TasksStatus.InProgress => "In Progress",
        TasksStatus.UnderReview => "Under Review",
        TasksStatus.Completed => "Completed",
        TasksStatus.Cancelled => "Cancelled",
        _ => Model.Status.ToString()
    };
}

=== File: ./BonyanForEngineeringConsultingFirms/Views/Task/Details.cshtml ===
﻿@model Bonyan.DAL.Models.Task
@using Bonyan.DAL.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "تفاصيل المهمة";
    var role = Context.Session.GetString("Role");

    string statusLabel = Model.Status switch
    {
        TasksStatus.Pending => "معلق",
        TasksStatus.InProgress => "جاري",
        TasksStatus.UnderReview => "قيد المراجعة",
        TasksStatus.Completed => "مكتمل",
        TasksStatus.Cancelled => "ملغي",
        _ => Model.Status.ToString()
    };
    string statusClass = Model.Status switch
    {
        TasksStatus.Pending => "badge-pending",
        TasksStatus.InProgress => "badge-inprogress",
        TasksStatus.UnderReview => "badge-review",
        TasksStatus.Completed => "badge-completed",
        TasksStatus.Cancelled => "badge-cancelled",
        _ => ""
    };
    string statusEn = Model.Status.ToString();
}

﻿@model IEnumerable<Bonyan.DAL.Models.Task>
@using Bonyan.DAL.Enums
@{
    ViewData["Title"] = "المهام";
    var role = Context.Session.GetString("Role");
    int? projectId = ViewBag.ProjectId as int?;
    string projectName = ViewBag.ProjectName as string ?? "";

    var today = DateTime.Today;
    var taskList = Model.ToList();
    var totalCount = taskList.Count;
    var pendingCount = taskList.Count(t => t.Status == TasksStatus.Pending);
    var inProgressCount = taskList.Count(t => t.Status == TasksStatus.InProgress);
    var reviewCount = taskList.Count(t => t.Status == TasksStatus.UnderReview);
    var completedCount = taskList.Count(t => t.Status == TasksStatus.Completed);
    var overdueCount = taskList.Count(t => t.DueDate.HasValue && t.DueDate.Value.Date < today
                        && t.Status != TasksStatus.Completed && t.Status != TasksStatus.Cancelled);
}

                else
                {
                    <span data-lang="all_tasks">جميع المهام</span>

                            }
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody id="taskTableBody">
                        @foreach (var t in Model)
                        {
                            string statusLabel = t.Status switch
                            {
                                TasksStatus.Pending => "معلق",
                                TasksStatus.InProgress => "جاري",
                                TasksStatus.UnderReview => "قيد المراجعة",
                                TasksStatus.Completed => "مكتمل",
                                TasksStatus.Cancelled => "ملغي",
                                _ => t.Status.ToString()
                            };
                            string statusLabelEn = t.Status switch
                            {
                                TasksStatus.Pending => "Pending",
                                TasksStatus.InProgress => "In Progress",
                                TasksStatus.UnderReview => "Under Review",
                                TasksStatus.Completed => "Completed",
                                TasksStatus.Cancelled => "Cancelled",
                                _ => t.Status.ToString()
                            };
                            string statusClass = t.Status switch
                            {
                                TasksStatus.Pending => "badge-pending",
                                TasksStatus.InProgress => "badge-inprogress",
                                TasksStatus.UnderReview => "badge-review",
                                TasksStatus.Completed => "badge-completed",
                                TasksStatus.Cancelled => "badge-cancelled",
                                _ => ""
                            };
                            string statusIcon = t.Status switch
                            {
                                TasksStatus.Pending => "fa-hourglass-half",
                                TasksStatus.InProgress => "fa-spinner",
                                TasksStatus.UnderReview => "fa-magnifying-glass",
                                TasksStatus.Completed => "fa-circle-check",
                                TasksStatus.Cancelled => "fa-circle-xmark",
                                _ => "fa-circle"
                            };
                            bool isOverdue = t.DueDate.HasValue && t.DueDate.Value.Date < today
                            && t.Status != TasksStatus.Completed
                            && t.Status != TasksStatus.Cancelled;

                            string initials = $"{(string.IsNullOrEmpty(t.AssignedToEmployee?.FirstName) ? "" : t.AssignedToEmployee.FirstName.Substring(0, 1))}{(string.IsNullOrEmpty(t.AssignedToEmployee?.LastName) ? "" : t.AssignedToEmployee.LastName.Substring(0, 1))}".ToUpper();

                            <tr class="task-row" data-status="@statusClass" data-name="@t.Task_Name.ToLower()">
                                <td>
                                    <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@t.TaskId" class="task-name-link">
                                        <span class="task-icon-dot"><i class="fas fa-clipboard"></i></span>
                                        <span>@t.Task_Name</span>
                                    </a>
                                </td>

                                @if (!projectId.HasValue)
                                {
                                    <td>
                                        @if (t.Project != null)
                                        {
                                            <span class="task-project-pill">
                                                <i class="fas fa-diagram-project"></i>
                                                @t.Project.ProjectName
                                            </span>
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {

                                            <span class="text-muted">—</span>
                                        }
                                    </td>
                                }

                                <td>
                                    <span class="task-status-badge @statusClass"
                                          data-en="@statusLabelEn"
                                          data-ar="@statusLabel">
                                        <i class="fas @statusIcon"></i>
                                        <span class="badge-text-ar">@statusLabel</span>
                                        <span class="badge-text-en" style="display:none">@statusLabelEn</span>
                                    </span>
                                </td>

                                <td>
                                    <div class="task-date-cell">

                                        <small>@t.CreatedAt.ToString("hh:mm tt")</small>
                                    </div>
                                </td>

                                <td>
                                    <div class="task-date-cell">
                                        <span>@(t.DueDate.HasValue? t.DueDate.Value.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd") : "—")</span>
                                        @if (isOverdue)
                                        {
                                            <span class="task-overdue-tag">
                                                <i class="fas fa-triangle-exclamation"></i>
                                                <span data-lang="overdue">متأخر</span>
                                            </span>
                                        }
                                    </div>
                                </td>

                                <td>
                                    @if (t.AssignedToEmployee != null)
                                    {
                                        <div class="task-assignee-cell">
                                            <div class="task-assignee-avatar">@initials</div>
                                            <span>@t.AssignedToEmployee.FirstName @t.AssignedToEmployee.LastName</span>
                                        </div>
                                    }
                                    else
                                    {
                                        <span class="task-assignee-unassigned">
                                            <i class="fas fa-user-slash"></i>
                                            <span data-lang="unassigned">غير معيَّن</span>
                                        </span>
                                    }
                                </td>

                                @if (role == "ProjectManager")
                                {
                                    <td>
                                        <div class="action-btns">
                                            <a asp-action="Details" asp-route-id="@t.TaskId"
                                               class="btn-action view"
                                               data-tip="عرض"
                                               data-tip-en="View">
                                                <i class="fas fa-eye"></i>
                                            </a>
                                            <a asp-action="Edit" asp-route-id="@t.TaskId"
                                               class="btn-action edit"
                                               data-tip="تعديل"
                                               data-tip-en="Edit">
                                                <i class="fas fa-pen"></i>
                                            </a>
                                            <a asp-action="Delete" asp-route-id="@t.TaskId"
                                               class="btn-action delete"
                                               data-tip="حذف"
                                               data-tip-en="Delete">
                                                <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                                            </a>
                                        </div>
                                    </td>
                                }
                            </tr>
                        }
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>


            <div class="empty-state" id="noResultsState" style="display:none">
                <i class="fas fa-filter-circle-xmark"></i>
                <h6 data-lang="no_match_title">لا توجد نتائج</h6>
                <p data-lang="no_match_sub">جرّب تغيير معايير البحث أو التصفية</p>
            </div>
        }
        else
        {
            <div class="empty-state">
                <i class="fas fa-clipboard-list"></i>
                <h6 data-lang="no_tasks_title">لا توجد مهام بعد</h6>
                @{
                    bool canAddTask = role == "ProjectManager" && projectId.HasValue;
                    string noTasksAr = canAddTask ? "ابدأ بإضافة مهمة جديدة للمشروع" : "لا توجد مهام مسجّلة حتى الآن";
                    string noTasksEn = canAddTask ? "Start by adding a new task for the project" : "No tasks have been recorded yet";
                }
                <p data-ar="@noTasksAr" data-en="@noTasksEn">@noTasksAr</p>
            </div>
        }
    </div>

</div>

@section Scripts {
    <script>
        /* ── Project filter ─────────────────────── */
        function filterTasksByProject(projId) {
            window.location.href = projId
                ? '@Url.Action("Index", "Task")?projectId=' + projId
                : '@Url.Action("Index", "Task")';
        }

        /* ── Live search + status filter ───────── */
        function applyFilters() {
            const q      = (document.getElementById('taskSearch')?.value || '').toLowerCase();
            const status = document.getElementById('statusFilter')?.value || '';
            const rows   = document.querySelectorAll('#taskTableBody .task-row');
            let visible  = 0;

            rows.forEach(row => {
                const name   = row.dataset.name || '';
                const rStatus= row.dataset.status || '';
                const matchQ = !q || name.includes(q);
                const matchS = !status || rStatus === status;
                const show   = matchQ && matchS;
                row.style.display = show ? '' : 'none';
                if (show) visible++;
            });

            const noRes = document.getElementById('noResultsState');
            if (noRes) noRes.style.display = visible === 0 ? 'flex' : 'none';

            const rc = document.getElementById('resultsCount');
            if (rc) rc.querySelector('strong').textContent = visible;

            const hb = document.getElementById('headerBadgeCount');
            if (hb) hb.textContent = visible;
        }

        function liveSearchTasks(val) { applyFilters(); }
        function filterByStatus(val)  { applyFilters(); }

        /* ── Language-aware badge labels ────────── */
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            const isAr = document.documentElement.dir !== 'ltr';
            document.querySelectorAll('.task-status-badge').forEach(b => {
                b.querySelectorAll('.badge-text-ar').forEach(el => el.style.display = isAr ? '' : 'none');
                b.querySelectorAll('.badge-text-en').forEach(el => el.style.display = isAr ? 'none' : '');
            });
            /* action button tooltips */
            const isLtr = document.documentElement.dir === 'ltr';
            document.querySelectorAll('.btn-action[data-tip-en]').forEach(btn => {
                if (isLtr) btn.setAttribute('data-tip', btn.dataset.tipEn);
            });
        });
    </script>
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   auth-theme.css
   Shared polish + dark mode for the standalone auth pages (Login,
   Register, ForgotPassword, ChangePassword) which sit outside the
   main app layout and therefore need their own light/dark handling.
   Uses the SAME localStorage key ("bonyan-dark") as the main app so
   the chosen theme stays consistent everywhere.
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

:root {
    --auth-primary: #1B3A6B;
    --auth-secondary: #C8922A;
}

body {
    background: radial-gradient(circle at 15% 20%, #eef2fb 0%, #F4F6F9 45%, #eef1f8 100%);
}

/* Entrance animation */
.login-wrapper,
.register-wrapper {
    animation: authFadeIn .45s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1) both;
}

@keyframes authFadeIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(14px) scale(.99); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }
}

/* A touch more depth + a hint of gold glow on the card */
.login-wrapper,
.register-wrapper {
    box-shadow: 0 25px 70px rgba(15,28,55,0.18), 0 0 0 1px rgba(200,146,42,0.06);
}

/* Inputs feel more premium */
.form-control {
    transition: all .25s ease;
}

.btn-login {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

    .btn-login::after {
        content: '';
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        background: linear-gradient(120deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.25), transparent);
        transform: translateX(-100%);
        transition: transform .6s ease;
    }

    .btn-login:hover::after {
        transform: translateX(100%);
    }

/* ── Theme toggle button (top corner, RTL-aware) ─────────────────── */
.auth-theme-toggle {
    position: fixed;
    top: 22px;
    left: 22px;
    width: 42px;
    height: 42px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: none;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
    color: var(--auth-primary);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(15,28,55,0.18);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    z-index: 999;
    transition: all .25s ease;
}

    .auth-theme-toggle:hover {
        transform: translateY(-2px) rotate(15deg);
        box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(15,28,55,0.25);
    }

    .auth-theme-toggle:active {
        transform: scale(0.92);
    }

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   DRAWING GALLERY — innovative redesign (grid+list, search, filters,
   lightbox). Uses global CSS variables (--surface, --text, --muted,
   --card-border, --primary, --secondary) so it adapts to dark mode
   automatically, and uses flex/gap instead of left/right margins so
   it works correctly in both RTL (Arabic) and LTR (English).
   ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

    0% {
        transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg);
    }

    50% {
        transform: translate(20px, -30px) rotate(8deg);
    }

    100% {
        transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg);
    }
}

    0% {
        transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg);
    }

    50% {
        transform: translate(-25px, -20px) rotate(-10deg);
    }

    100% {
        transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg);
    }
}

@keyframes spinSlow {
    from {
        transform: rotate(0deg);
    }

    to {
        transform: rotate(360deg);
    }

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   theme-pro.css
   Bonyan design-polish + complete light/dark theme layer.

   Loaded LAST in <head>. Because dark-mode rules below always include
   "body.dark-mode" (two extra selector classes), they out-rank the
   plain, single-class rules in the page-specific stylesheets
   (project.css, employee.css, invoice.css, ...) regardless of link
   order — so this single file is enough to bring dark mode to every
   page without editing two dozen files individually.
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* ── 0. Token fixes + extra tokens ─────────────────────────────────── */
:root {
    --secondary-rgb: 200, 146, 42;
    --primary-rgb: 27, 58, 107;
    --danger-rgb: 239, 68, 68;
    --success-rgb: 34, 197, 94;
    --shadow-card: 0 2px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
    --shadow-card-hover: 0 10px 28px rgba(20,30,60,0.12);
    --radius-card: 14px;
}

body.dark-mode {
    --secondary-rgb: 233, 185, 73;
    --primary-rgb: 22, 38, 63;
    --shadow-card: 0 2px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.38);
    --shadow-card-hover: 0 14px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
    /* semantic badge palette reused everywhere below */
    --b-blue-bg: #0E2E37;
    --b-blue-text: #6FD4E9;
    --b-indigo-bg: #16263F;
    --b-indigo-text: #8FB3F5;
    --b-green-bg: #14361F;
    --b-green-text: #6FCF8E;
    --b-amber-bg: #3A2E0E;
    --b-amber-text: #E9B949;
    --b-red-bg: #3A1418;
    --b-red-text: #F18A93;
    --b-purple-bg: #241A3A;
    --b-purple-text: #C9A6F2;
    --b-pink-bg: #34182B;
    --b-pink-text: #F2A8D6;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   1. GLOBAL POLISH — applies in both light & dark
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

html {
    scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

::selection {
    background: var(--secondary);
    color: #fff;
}

/* Smooth, consistent theme-switch animation across the whole shell */
body,
.bonyan-navbar,
.bonyan-sidebar,
.bonyan-content,
.sidebar-menu li a,
[class$="-card"],
[class*="-card"],
[class$="-bar"],
table,
.form-control,
.form-select,
input,
select,
textarea,
.dropdown-menu {
    transition: background-color .25s ease, color .25s ease, border-color .25s ease, box-shadow .25s ease;
}

    /* Accessible, on-brand focus ring everywhere (replaces invisible/blue browser default) */
    a:focus-visible,
    button:focus-visible,
    .btn:focus-visible,
    input:focus-visible,
    select:focus-visible,
    textarea:focus-visible,
    [tabindex]:focus-visible {
        outline: 2px solid var(--secondary);
        outline-offset: 2px;
        border-radius: 4px;
    }

/* Custom slim scrollbar for the whole app (already present on sidebar only) */
* {
    scrollbar-width: thin;
    scrollbar-color: rgba(27,58,107,0.25) transparent;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar {
    width: 9px;
    height: 9px;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
    background: transparent;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
    background: rgba(27,58,107,0.22);
    border-radius: 20px;
    border: 2px solid transparent;
    background-clip: padding-box;
}

    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
        background: rgba(27,58,107,0.4);
        background-clip: padding-box;
    }

body.dark-mode * {
    scrollbar-color: rgba(233,185,73,0.25) transparent;
}

body.dark-mode ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
    background: rgba(233,185,73,0.2);
    background-clip: padding-box;
}

    body.dark-mode ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
        background: rgba(233,185,73,0.38);
        background-clip: padding-box;
    }

/* Page content enters gently instead of popping in */
.bonyan-content {
    animation: bonyanFadeIn .35s ease both;
}

@keyframes bonyanFadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(8px);
    }

    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

/* Badges everywhere get a hint of definition instead of flat color blocks */
[class*="badge-"],
.status-badge,
.task-status-badge,
.invoice-status-badge,
.file-type-badge,
.unit-badge,

.btn-bonyan-secondary,
.btn-bonyan-danger,

.mi-btn,

    .btn-bonyan-secondary:active,
    .btn-bonyan-danger:active,

        transform: translateY(0) scale(0.98);
    }

.mi-empty i {

}

/* Sidebar toggle / icon buttons: subtle press feedback */
.navbar-icon-btn:active,
.sidebar-toggle:active {
    transform: scale(0.92);
}

    display: inline-block;
    transition: transform .4s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);
}

#darkModeBtn:hover #darkModeIcon {
    transform: rotate(25deg);
}

// about.js — counter animation

(function () {
    function animateCounter(el, target) {
        var current = 0;
        var step = Math.ceil(target / 80);
        var timer = setInterval(function () {
            current += step;
            if (current >= target) {
                current = target;
                clearInterval(timer);
            }
            el.textContent = current.toLocaleString();
        }, 25);
    }

    function initCounters() {
        animateCounter(document.getElementById("statProjects"), 850);
        animateCounter(document.getElementById("statOffices"), 120);
        animateCounter(document.getElementById("statEngineers"), 3400);
        animateCounter(document.getElementById("statDocuments"), 12500);
    }

    // Run on load
    if (document.readyState === "complete") {
        initCounters();
    } else {
        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", initCounters);
    }
})();
=== File: ./BonyanForEngineeringConsultingFirms/wwwroot/js/auth-theme.js ===
/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   auth-theme.js
   Light/dark toggle for the standalone auth pages (Login,
   Register, ForgotPassword, ChangePassword). Shares the same
   "bonyan-dark" localStorage key as the main app layout, so
   switching theme on one is reflected everywhere.
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
(function () {
    function injectToggleButton() {
        var btn = document.createElement('button');
        btn.type = 'button';
        btn.className = 'auth-theme-toggle';
        btn.id = 'authThemeToggle';
        btn.title = 'Dark / Light';
        btn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Toggle theme');
        btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-moon" id="authThemeIcon"></i>';
        document.body.appendChild(btn);
        return btn;
    }

    function syncIcon() {
        var icon = document.getElementById('authThemeIcon');
        if (!icon) return;
        icon.className = document.body.classList.contains('dark-mode') ? 'fas fa-sun' : 'fas fa-moon';
    }

    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
        var btn = injectToggleButton();
        syncIcon();

        btn.addEventListener('click', function () {
            var on = !document.body.classList.contains('dark-mode');
            document.body.classList.toggle('dark-mode', on);
            localStorage.setItem('bonyan-dark', on ? '1' : '0');
            syncIcon();
        });
    });
})();
=== File: ./BonyanForEngineeringConsultingFirms/wwwroot/js/lang-switch.js ===
﻿// lang-switch.js

function applyLanguage(lang) {
    const data = TRANSLATIONS[lang];
    if (!data) return;

    // 1. Set dir + lang on <html>
    document.documentElement.setAttribute("dir", lang === "ar" ? "rtl" : "ltr");
    document.documentElement.setAttribute("lang", lang);
    localStorage.setItem("lang", lang);

    // 2. Apply font family on body
    document.body.style.fontFamily = lang === "ar"
        ? "'Cairo', sans-serif"
        : "'Poppins', sans-serif";

    // 3. Translate all [data-lang] elements
    document.querySelectorAll("[data-lang]").forEach(function (el) {
        var key = el.getAttribute("data-lang");
        if (!data[key]) return;

        // Don't overwrite elements that only contain child nodes (icons etc.)
        // Only set innerText if the element has no child elements, OR is a <span>/<p>/<td> etc.
        if (el.children.length === 0) {
            el.innerText = data[key];
        } else {
            // Find a text node child and update it, leave icons intact
            el.childNodes.forEach(function (node) {
                if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE && node.textContent.trim() !== "") {
                    node.textContent = data[key];
                }
            });
        }

        // Also handle placeholder attribute
        if (el.tagName === "INPUT" || el.tagName === "TEXTAREA") {
            el.setAttribute("placeholder", data[key]);
        }
    });

    // 4. Update lang button text (only the <span> inside it, not the icon)
    var langBtnText = document.getElementById("langBtnText");
    if (langBtnText) {
        langBtnText.textContent = lang === "ar" ? "English" : "العربية";
    }

    // 5. Update placeholder-only elements
    document.querySelectorAll("[data-lang-placeholder]").forEach(function (el) {
        var key = el.getAttribute("data-lang-placeholder");
        if (data[key]) el.setAttribute("placeholder", data[key]);
    });

    // 5a. Update aria-label-only elements (icon-only buttons, e.g. lightbox close)
    document.querySelectorAll("[data-lang-aria]").forEach(function (el) {
        var key = el.getAttribute("data-lang-aria");
        if (data[key]) {
            el.setAttribute("aria-label", data[key]);
            el.setAttribute("title", data[key]);
        }
    });

    // 5b. Translate dynamic per-row values (status badges, roles, etc.)
    //     These carry their own pre-computed Arabic/English text via
    //     data-ar / data-en attributes (set server-side) instead of a
    //     shared dictionary key, since the text differs per row/record.
    document.querySelectorAll("[data-en][data-ar]").forEach(function (el) {
        el.textContent = lang === "ar" ? el.getAttribute("data-ar") : el.getAttribute("data-en");
    });

    // 6. Fire custom event for other scripts
    document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("languageChanged", { detail: { lang: lang } }));
}

function toggleLanguage() {
    var current = localStorage.getItem("lang") || "ar";
    applyLanguage(current === "ar" ? "en" : "ar");
}

// Apply saved language on page load
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    var saved = localStorage.getItem("lang") || "ar";
    applyLanguage(saved);
});=== File: ./BonyanForEngineeringConsultingFirms/wwwroot/js/navbar.js ===
﻿/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   navbar.js
   Behavior for: live clock, notification center (real system
   data), chatbot panel, and language-button label sync.
   Dark mode + sidebar toggle stay in _Layout.cshtml as-is.
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {

    /* ── 1. LIVE DATE / TIME ─────────────────────────────── */
    function updateClock() {
        const timeEl = document.getElementById("navbarTime");
        const dateEl = document.getElementById("navbarDate");
        if (!timeEl || !dateEl) return;

        const lang = document.documentElement.getAttribute("lang") || "ar";
        const locale = lang === "ar" ? "ar-EG" : "en-US";
        const now = new Date();

        timeEl.textContent = now.toLocaleTimeString(locale, {
            hour: "2-digit",
            minute: "2-digit"
        });
        dateEl.textContent = now.toLocaleDateString(locale, {
            weekday: "short",
            day: "numeric",
            month: "short"
        });
    }
    updateClock();
    setInterval(updateClock, 1000 * 30);

    /* ── 2. NOTIFICATION CENTER ──────────────────────────────
       Live data from GET /Home/GetNotifications, built from
       real overdue tasks, overdue invoices, and site-visit
       safety alerts (see HomeController.GetNotifications). */
    const notifBadge = document.getElementById("notifBadge");
    const notifList = document.getElementById("notifList");
    const notifClear = document.getElementById("notifClearBtn");

    const notifIcons = {
        warning: "fa-exclamation-triangle",
        danger: "fa-clock",
        info: "fa-info-circle",
        success: "fa-check-circle"
    };

    function fetchNotifications() {
        fetch("/Home/GetNotifications", {
            headers: { "X-Requested-With": "XMLHttpRequest" }
        })
            .then(r => {
                if (!r.ok) throw new Error("Failed to load notifications");
                return r.json();
            })
            .then(renderNotifications)
            .catch(() => renderNotifications([]));
    }

    function renderNotifications(items) {
        if (!notifList) return;

        const unreadCount = items.filter(n => !n.isRead).length;
        if (notifBadge) {
            notifBadge.style.display = unreadCount > 0 ? "flex" : "none";
            notifBadge.textContent = unreadCount > 9 ? "9+" : unreadCount;
        }

        if (items.length === 0) {
            notifList.innerHTML = `<div class="navbar-notif-empty">لا توجد إشعارات جديدة</div>`;
            return;
        }

        notifList.innerHTML = items.map(n => `
            <a href="${n.url || "#"}" class="navbar-notif-item ${n.isRead ? "" : "unread"}" data-id="${n.id}">
                <div class="navbar-notif-icon ${n.type}">
                    <i class="fas ${notifIcons[n.type] || "fa-bell"}"></i>
                </div>
                <div class="navbar-notif-text">
                    <div class="navbar-notif-title">${n.title}</div>
                    <div class="navbar-notif-sub">${n.sub}</div>
                    <div class="navbar-notif-time">${n.time}</div>
                </div>
            </a>
        `).join("");
    }

    if (notifClear) {
        notifClear.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            document.querySelectorAll(".navbar-notif-item.unread").forEach(el => el.classList.remove("unread"));
            if (notifBadge) notifBadge.style.display = "none";
        });
    }

    fetchNotifications();
    setInterval(fetchNotifications, 120000); // poll every 2 minutes

    /* ── 3. CHATBOT PANEL ────────────────────────────────── */
    const chatbotToggleBtn = document.getElementById("chatbotToggleBtn");
    const chatbotPanel = document.getElementById("chatbotPanel");
    const chatbotCloseBtn = document.getElementById("chatbotCloseBtn");
    const chatbotInput = document.getElementById("chatbotInput");
    const chatbotSendBtn = document.getElementById("chatbotSendBtn");
    const chatbotBody = document.getElementById("chatbotBody");

    function openChatbot() {
        chatbotPanel?.classList.add("open");
        chatbotInput?.focus();
    }
    function closeChatbot() {
        chatbotPanel?.classList.remove("open");
    }

    chatbotToggleBtn?.addEventListener("click", function () {
        chatbotPanel?.classList.contains("open") ? closeChatbot() : openChatbot();
    });
    chatbotCloseBtn?.addEventListener("click", closeChatbot);

   function appendChatMessage(text, sender) {
    if (!chatbotBody) return;
    const msg = document.createElement("div");
    msg.className = `chatbot-msg chatbot-msg-${sender}`;
    if (sender === "bot") {
        // Convert bold and newlines to HTML for prettier display
        const formatted = text.replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, "<strong>$1</strong>").replace(/\n/g, "<br>");
        msg.innerHTML = formatted;
    } else {
        msg.textContent = text;
    }

    chatbotBody.appendChild(msg);
    chatbotBody.scrollTop = chatbotBody.scrollHeight;
}

    
    function sendChatMessage() {
        const text = chatbotInput.value.trim();
        if (!text) return;
        appendChatMessage(text, "user"); applyLanguage
        chatbotInput.value = "";

        fetch("/Ai/SendMessage", {
            method: "POST",
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
            body: JSON.stringify({ message: text })
        })
        .then(r => r.json())
        .then(data => {
            if (data.success) {
                appendChatMessage(data.message, "bot");
            } else {
                appendChatMessage("Error: " + data.message, "bot");
            }
        })
        .catch(() => {
            appendChatMessage("Something went wrong. Please try again.", "bot");
        });

       

       
        setTimeout(() => {
            appendChatMessage("هذه استجابة تجريبية — اربط هذا الجزء بخدمة الشات بوت الفعلية.", "bot");
        }, 500);
    }

    

    chatbotSendBtn?.addEventListener("click", sendChatMessage);
    chatbotInput?.addEventListener("keypress", function (e) {
        if (e.key === "Enter") sendChatMessage();
    });
    /* ── 4. LANG BUTTON SYNC — handled by lang-switch.js ─── */

});=== File: ./BonyanForEngineeringConsultingFirms/wwwroot/js/show-password.js ===
﻿// Show/Hide password toggle — works for all password fields
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    document.querySelectorAll('.toggle-password').forEach(function (btn) {
        btn.addEventListener('click', function () {
            var targetId = this.getAttribute('data-target');
            var input = document.getElementById(targetId);
            if (!input) return;

            if (input.type === 'password') {
                input.type = 'text';
                this.classList.remove('fa-eye');
                this.classList.add('fa-eye-slash');
            } else {
                input.type = 'password';
                this.classList.remove('fa-eye-slash');
                this.classList.add('fa-eye');
            }
        });
    });
});=== File: ./BonyanForEngineeringConsultingFirms/wwwroot/js/translations.js ===
